A lot has happened over the past few months so I wanted to reach out to a few well-informed people in Pennsylvania for a new Digital Interview.

President Biden, Vice President Harris, and the entire administration have made such tremendous progress on important issues like the COVID-19 pandemic.

[But extremists in the Republican Party are still spreading lies about the election, making it harder for people to vote, and targeting Democrats to DEFEAT next year.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnbn6EOpljvfzmuHktpmffkZvckoQuPDXLU5FIs3LFKq-JB1dnz4zdvR8xD4jBrHjP7gPoe52YqaFX1g3o1KbC6IRhaVqjM6SHdTM6QHDW0AOZFZaW579SRDe2lX1n6oAE0HrO1-VZMDZIFmzbayZ1evDZ3QCYypDvkv_6hx_DGjW77QYpSwbLKzFq-BZ6DeZuBtoNGJGcAREnD9t_cPSMGFdoc-yFy3EfLCJmQfJyToipBo9jl5XcsweQqg3oTuc3YWKa_M5X53SoahF3upYr9PJNL3EynGlqwlRPny0q9iHjw8jAu-T0FQrQyjeiSd_i6a5LVzHJqOb_6sSFmBqqYXhCYXgD47gWNuEE0yxevCFMu4RrXNuOqHfKphTubeqo/3ct/oSlmDuIkQqS0XYeaLOS55g/h3/swj17ilH2c3jrm8rrqHFAI0CWycdp0HAoFvsSslcGGs)

I was looking through my records, and you stuck out as someone I can count on to give me an honest assessment of how things are going for you in Pennsylvania.

I need your help to create an air-tight strategy to protect my swing district, secure our Democratic Majority, and help President Biden and Vice President Harris pass their agenda.

[**You’re one of only a few people in Pennsylvania that I’m reaching out to._Please, take a minute or two to complete your Digital Interview:_**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnbn6EOpljvfzmuHktpmffkZvckoQuPDXLU5FIs3LFKq-JB1dnz4zdvR8xD4jBrHjP7gPoe52YqaFX1g3o1KbC6IRhaVqjM6SHdTM6QHDW0AOZFZaW579SRDe2lX1n6oAE0HrO1-VZMDZIFmzbayZ1ejhD_p8tt14ygNC5XDDLdsUEfpxtMhECFarfzBqPceRYLZHUGTlFqU-EdsEGtxvBr-o2uHEF-_Z8YzbDLJiiisWAQwy3RoqC1IBkbx9-NL9M1QqjcVLHHsNYmjTPq4axy_ylaWkYwDdo1euKK9WHYsIB16AlV8UBUVMSZmQ0jvgR9Igz_mwaUwsJRE0m-pXegLF00oXDl59KlV25xOv6ga_d-cJUnMbwYzyiVysHhh1k/3ct/oSlmDuIkQqS0XYeaLOS55g/h6/ZQriSLaxO8pTISDGtGcFmrVbh4Ovu07NhFqnenvugyU)

I'm so thankful for your support.

With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward.

But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. |

clean_body: this is important | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | A lot has happened over the past few months so I wanted to reach out to a few well-informed people in Pennsylvania for a new Digital Interview. President Biden, Vice President Harris, and the entire administration have made such tremendous progress on important issues like the COVID-19 pandemic. I was looking through my records, and you stuck out as someone I can count on to give me an honest assessment of how things are going for you in Pennsylvania. I need your help to create an air-tight strategy to protect my swing district, secure our Democratic Majority, and help President Biden and Vice President Harris pass their agenda. Thanks for your help! \-- Dr. Raul Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? name: Senator Josh Hawley
subject: MEMO: Schumer's Big Bold Agenda
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR
body:
Peter,
I believe that it is essential that the
American people know the truth about what is going on in their
government, and it is clear they aren't getting the truth from
the media.
Chuck Schumer has his "Big, Bold Agenda," and
it's about to unfold right before our eyes. I need your help to
stop him before he uses his socialist agenda to destroy America.

Chuck has a plan to secure a permanent
Democrat Majority by destroying our nation's election integrity.
Chuck has a plan to place your family at
the whims of the Antifa mobs by defunding the police.
Chuck has a plan to abandon the nation of
Israel to appease the Squad
Chuck has a plan to outlaw your right to
own a firearm - any firearm
Chuck has a plan to sell our nation's
future to Communist China

Chuck Schumer is so worried about AOC running
against him in the New York Senate Primary that he is doing all
he can to win over progressives. He doesn't care if he
completely tears down everything we love about this great nation.
And if you dare to stand up against Chuck's
plan, you will be silenced. The media will shout you down as a
racist, and you WILL be canceled.
NO MORE. We must resist the socialist
takeover of America.
I have been fighting, and even I was
unprepared for how swift my punishment was. The media sent a
Washington Post reporter to my childhood home to talk to people I
went to middle school with about my work in the U.S. Senate. It
might be funny if it wasn't so creepy.

STAND WITH JOSH

If they are waiting for me to give up, they
are going to be disappointed. They will be even more
disappointed when they see my fundraising report after the
upcoming end-of-quarter deadline.
Fighting for your rights is why I'm here in
Washington, and I won't give up until we put an end to Chuck
Schumer's Big, Bold Agenda. Will you donate before June 30th so
I can send shockwaves through the Democrat establishment?
As the left and their friends in the media
keep up their attacks on me, Chuck Schumer will throw out the
filibuster and trample all over our Constitution to pass an
agenda more progressive than anything FDR proposed.
We must stand and fight. I'm here doing my

clean_body: Peter, I believe that it is essential that the American people know the truth about what is going on in their government, and it is clear they aren't getting the truth from the media. Chuck Schumer has his "Big, Bold Agenda," and it's about to unfold right before our eyes. I need your help to stop him before he uses his socialist agenda to destroy America. Chuck has a plan to secure a permanent Democrat Majority by destroying our nation's election integrity. Chuck has a plan to place your family at the whims of the Antifa mobs by defunding the police. Chuck has a plan to abandon the nation of Israel to appease the Squad Chuck has a plan to outlaw your right to own a firearm - any firearm Chuck has a plan to sell our nation's future to Communist China Chuck Schumer is so worried about AOC running against him in the New York Senate Primary that he is doing all he can to win over progressives. He doesn't care if he completely tears down everything we love about this great nation. And if you dare to stand up against Chuck's plan, you will be silenced. The media will shout you down as a racist, and you WILL be canceled. NO MORE. We must resist the socialist takeover of America. I have been fighting, and even I was unprepared for how swift my punishment was. The media sent a Washington Post reporter to my childhood home to talk to people I went to middle school with about my work in the U.S. Senate. It might be funny if it wasn't so creepy. STAND WITH JOSH If they are waiting for me to give up, they are going to be disappointed. They will be even more disappointed when they see my fundraising report after the upcoming end-of-quarter deadline. Fighting for your rights is why I'm here in Washington, and I won't give up until we put an end to Chuck Schumer's Big, Bold Agenda. Will you donate before June 30th so I can send shockwaves through the Democrat establishment? As the left and their friends in the media keep up their attacks on me, Chuck Schumer will throw out the filibuster and trample all over our Constitution to pass an agenda more progressive than anything FDR proposed. We must stand and fight. I'm here doing my part, and I need your help. Are you with me? For America, Josh Hawley U.S. Senator, Missouri STAND WITH JOSH PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE Please take a minute to read the special message from our sponsor. I wanted to personally share some exciting news with you.

I am a proud American, and am honored to represent the Republican National Committee, the Party of hard-working Americans. Too often, in today’s culture, the Liberal News Media and the Left ignore huge parts of our Country.

This is exactly why, today, we launch the FIRST season of a new podcast called “Real America,” where I will be speaking to leaders and policymakers from across our great nation on the frontlines of dealing with the REAL problems facing the American people every day.

In the first episode, I am honored to be joined by South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem. We discuss it all, from her leadership during the COVID-19 pandemic to how Republican policies are leading America’s comeback, and she even shares some personal stories of her numerous other roles as farmer, rancher, and mother along the way.

https://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=75fc1d736c9b7ca47dab102ad8d564805b3d0b4c619eb3f38a3baade52d8dd3ddb371580278caec402f845a7fa0f04ecad551c18cd77291b

Listen NOW
In upcoming episodes, I’ll be speaking with Texas Governor Greg Abbott and Former Secretary of State Mike Pompeo, just to name a few. The best way to ensure you don’t miss a single episode is to subscribe to “Real America” TODAY.

I hope you’ll join me on this journey to hear from our Party’s leaders in a brand new way - with unfiltered and unbiased access - one the mainstream liberal media refuses to cover.

I am confident you will enjoy. Thank you,

And now, he’s running to become Governor of Iowa. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30893884/290945525/-1891813345?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210616launch2rs_tr_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGI0NWE3Mi1iMmNlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Chl1UatPqYKZGO8lh_yMHxxwy_ybzsQZC9UaQ8bB-fA=)

Friends, Ras Smith wears a lot of shoes: he’s a state representative, a father, a husband, a hunter, a farmer, a coach, and a counselor. **And now, he’s running to become Governor of Iowa.** **[Click to watch his official launch video explaining why, then pitch in $5 or more to become a founding donor of our grassroots campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30893885/290945526/-1891813345?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210616launch2rs_tr_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGI0NWE3Mi1iMmNlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Chl1UatPqYKZGO8lh_yMHxxwy_ybzsQZC9UaQ8bB-fA=)** | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30893886/290945527/-1532682824?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210616launch2rs_tr_full_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGI0NWE3Mi1iMmNlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Chl1UatPqYKZGO8lh_yMHxxwy_ybzsQZC9UaQ8bB-fA=)
---
Ras knows we are all defined less by the shoes we wear, and more by what we’re working for. No matter the differences, we’re all looking for solutions to our common struggles and searching for the same things:
A safe community to live and raise our families.
Opportunities to succeed, no matter where you live or where you come from.
The chance to look beyond the next paycheck and start planning for the next generation.
**Working for a better life. For a better Iowa. That’s what unites us.**
At the end of the day, we’re all on this journey together. Ras knows Iowa’s best days are ahead of us, and he’s ready to lead us on the path to progress and unity.
**[This is Day 2 of our campaign, and there’s a long road ahead of us. Will you support Ras today by pitching in a contribution of any amount to become a founding donor?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30893887/290945528/-1891813345?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210616launch2rs_tr_full_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGI0NWE3Mi1iMmNlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Chl1UatPqYKZGO8lh_yMHxxwy_ybzsQZC9UaQ8bB-fA=)**

And now, he’s running to become Governor of Iowa. | = Friends, Ras Smith wears a lot of shoes: he’s a state representative, a father, a husband, a hunter, a farmer, a coach, and a counselor. And now, he’s running to become Governor of Iowa. = | = Ras knows we are all defined less by the shoes we wear, and more by what we’re working for. No matter the differences, we’re all looking for solutions to our common struggles and searching for the same things: A safe community to live and raise our families. Opportunities to succeed, no matter where you live or where you come from. The chance to look beyond the next paycheck and start planning for the next generation. Working for a better life. For a better Iowa. That’s what unites us. At the end of the day, we’re all on this journey together. Ras knows Iowa’s best days are ahead of us, and he’s ready to lead us on the path to progress and unity. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Like Ras says: let’s lace up our shoes and get to work. — Team Ras | Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor Ras Smith for Governor P. name: Conservative Senate
subject: Defeat Senator Mark Kelly
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES ACTION AND NOT
body:
Fellow Conservative:

It's time.

The 2022 campaign for the U.S. Senate is officially
underway, and the Democrats just announced they are pumping big
money into Arizona to save liberal incumbent Senator Mark Kelly
(D-AZ).

Conservatives have to answer.

Democrats' plan is simple: tell Arizonans that Mark
Kelly is a centrist.
Don't you believe it. On the issues that matter most
- immigration, spending, religious liberty, right to life - Kelly
is as extreme as Chuck Schumer, Bernie Sanders, and AOC.

Washington Democrats know Arizonans don't want a
woke extremist in the Senate. So they have launched their
campaign seven months earlier than ever before - trying to get a
head start on the truth!

We have to respond - immediately.

Senate Conservatives Action is producing ads right
now, setting the record straight about Mark Kelly's radical
extremism.

We need to raise $200,000 to buy media space,
micro-targeting the Arizona voters who will decide this Senate
race.

Specifically, there are many voters who supported
President Trump in 2020 but voted against the Republican Senate
candidate. We have to reach these voters before the Democrats
can.

Please contribute today, and we will spend 100% of
your donation exposing Mark Kelly and answering the Democrats'
lies.

We need this money right away. We can't let the Left
set a fake narrative. Mark Kelly is no centrist - he cast the
deciding vote putting Chuck Schumer in charge of the Senate, and
supports some of the most radical bills in Congress.

If Democrats' false message goes unchallenged this
summer, Mark Kelly will be able to keep that seat in 2022. We
won't let that happen.

Every dime you contribute today - 100% - will be
used to expose Mark Kelly for the leftist he is.

There are no limits to your contribution. We need
$200,000 right away to answer the Left's lies and tell the truth
about liberal Mark Kelly.

Please join us in supporting this urgent political
advertising campaign in this make-or-break Senate race.

Thank you for considering this request and for doing
so much to help fight for conservative leadership in Washington.

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Action

DEFEAT MARK KELLY

DONATE

Senate Conservatives Action300 Independence Ave
SEWashington, DC 20003

Senate Conservatives Action is a grassroots
organization that promotes conservative policies in Washington
and that helps elect principled candidates to the U.S. Senate.

Contributions are not deductible for federal income
tax purposes. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to
report the name, address, employer and occupation of all whose
contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year.
Federal law allows Senate Conservatives Action to accept
unlimited contributions from any U.S. citizen or foreign national
with permanent resident status in the United States, and from any
U.S. corporation or domestic U.S. subsidiary. Donors may not be
federal contractors.

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES ACTION AND NOT
AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
SENATEACTION.COM

You were added to the system April 25, 2020.

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: I just introduced legislation to protect abortion access – and I need your help to pass it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=bNdXdfF7ZPxY5ghYp8TDVY%2Fb1HEhFn4w&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
As chair of the Senate Judiciary Committee's Constitution subcommittee, I will be holding a hearing later today about protecting Roe v. Wade with legislation I have introduced, the Women's Health Protection Act. I hope you'll allow me a moment to explain why this law - which will guarantee equal access to abortion everywhere in the United States - is so important, and why I need your help.
Right-wing state legislators have waged coordinated attacks on women's reproductive freedoms for decades - and now, the endgame for those conservative attacks has finally materialized: The Supreme Court will consider a direct attack on Roe v. Wade when they deliberate the constitutionality of Mississippi's extremist abortion ban this October.
Laws like Mississippi's are about more than personal healthcare choices. This is an issue of human rights, economic rights, and social justice. While the rest of the world is making progress - bolstering access to abortion significantly over the last two decades - state-based attacks in the U.S. have upended women's access to healthcare: These draconian laws are hurting women and families as they make personal and difficult medical decisions.
If the Court's 6-3 conservative majority - cemented by Donald Trump - upholds this abortion ban, it will fundamentally undermine Roe v. Wade. **That 's why I'm taking action in the Senate to ensure, whichever way the Supreme Court rules, that Americans' access to safe and legal abortion is _protected_ by the Women's Health Protection Act.**
Despite the majority of voters wanting abortion protected under federal law, it is going to take a groundswell of grassroots advocacy to get this bill passed through Congress. **To power this legislation through the Senate, I 'm counting on 2,000 members of this team to sign on as Citizen Co-Sponsors of the Women's Health Protection Act: [Will you step up now to become a Citizen Co-Sponsor before our 11:59 p.m. deadline tonight? We need all the support we can muster to pass this legislation and protect women's reproductive rights.](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-whpa?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1043-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-0521%3Fcode%3Djtk1043-su-nd)**
[BECOME A CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-whpa?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1043-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-0521%3Fcode%3Djtk1043-su-nd)
Make no mistake: We cannot let hypocritical, so-called anti-government Republicans force our country back to a time when the government controlled people's personal decisions about whether and when to have a child.
We cannot go back to an era where abortion was driven underground because it was illegal - making it unsafe, jeopardizing people's lives.
We cannot go back to an America where the rich and privileged get whatever care they need, but those who make up the rest of the country - especially Black women and other women of color - are left to struggle and suffer.
**And we cannot allow a political climate where the extremist political dogma of mainly white male lawmakers trumps basic human rights.**
You can take action to prevent our country from turning backward, Friend: Join me in getting the Women's Health Protection Act passed through the Senate so that extremist attacks on abortion are stopped at the state level, and so that abortion access is guaranteed _everywhere_ , no matter what the Supreme Court decides in its upcoming ruling.
**[I'm counting on your name on my list of Citizen Co-Sponsors before 11:59 p.m. tonight, so please sign on to protect women's reproductive freedoms right now and pass this crucial legislation through Congress. ](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-whpa?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1043-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-0521%3Fcode%3Djtk1043-su-nd)**
Thank you,
Dick
[ Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1043-su-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=megPoSJPzUjB92mMsgQQko%2Fb1HEhFn4w&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: What I told MSNBC’s Chuck Todd
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
It’s no secret.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30897887/290964060/-2023814932?refcode=20210616.1_TM_6AX_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDM5NzAxMS1iY2NlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sQwLUIkrf49ZB7S5M1m6iRLDvgzbY1P5-b5xSu8dX0I=)

| | After Donald Trump endorsed Glenn Youngkin, the Virginia Governor’s race became 2021’s most important. Trump is using Youngkin to strengthen his grip on the Republican Party -- he desperately needs a win ahead of next year’s midterm elections.

Derek, Virginia voters shellacked Trump in 2016 and 2020. I led those efforts and I know we can beat him again.

On MSNBC last week, I told Chuck Todd exactly how we do it: by building the largest grassroots donor army in the history of Virginia politics. It’s the only way we can match Youngkin’s deep pockets and stop him from buying this race for Donald Trump.

[**Will you pitch in whatever you can and be a part of this historic team?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30897888/290964079/-2023814932?refcode=20210616.1_TM_6AX_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDM5NzAxMS1iY2NlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sQwLUIkrf49ZB7S5M1m6iRLDvgzbY1P5-b5xSu8dX0I=)

clean_body: It’s no secret. | | | = | | After Donald Trump endorsed Glenn Youngkin, the Virginia Governor’s race became 2021’s most important. Trump is using Youngkin to strengthen his grip on the Republican Party -- he desperately needs a win ahead of next year’s midterm elections. Derek, Virginia voters shellacked Trump in 2016 and 2020. I led those efforts and I know we can beat him again. On MSNBC last week, I told Chuck Todd exactly how we do it: by building the largest grassroots donor army in the history of Virginia politics. It’s the only way we can match Youngkin’s deep pockets and stop him from buying this race for Donald Trump. = We’ve got a big task ahead of us, Derek, but I know you’re up to the challenge and that’s why I know we’ll win. \-- Terry | = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 31408 Alexandria, VA 22310 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click._ Paid for by Terry for Virginia

subject: ICYMI: it’s time to fire Ron Johnson

body:
---
| | Hi team,

name: Team Franchot
subject: How you can propel our people-powered movement
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Hi Peter --
Every weekend from now to Election Day, June 28, 2022, Team Franchot will be pounding the pavement and placing phone calls to reach out to the voters that will secure our victory. Here’s a great snapshot of Team Franchot volunteers in action from just a few days ago:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keepusontrack?refcode=Active&amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keepusontrack?refcode=Active&amount=20.22]We don’t need to tell you that these smiling faces are a welcome sight after the hardships of this past year. As a state and as a nation, we’ve all suffered greatly during the COVID-19 pandemic. But we’re happy to see that change is right around the corner. The sun is shining, Maryland is slowly opening back up, and we’re once again holding in-person events and door-to-door canvassing.
Hitting the doors is just one part of our expansive statewide strategy. To win this election, we have an aggressive ramp-up schedule planned in the coming months, and grassroots supporters like you are absolutely crucial to our success. We need your support to keep our fundraising goals on track, so that we can hire more organizers, open future field offices, print more campaign literature and yard signs, run more digital ads, and ultimately build the critical mass of support that will propel Peter Franchot to victory.
Will you help us stay on track by chipping in to our campaign?
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keepusontrack?refcode=Active&amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keepusontrack?refcode=Active&amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keepusontrack?refcode=Active&amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keepusontrack?refcode=Active&amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keepusontrack?refcode=Active]Peter Franchot is an unprecedented candidate for these unprecedented times. Rebuilding Maryland’s economy will be a Herculean task, and no one is better prepared for it than Peter. As our state’s long-running chief fiscal officer, he has an unparalleled understanding of the state’s budget -- a necessary skill for the next Governor that cannot be learned on the job.
Anything you can give to keep our campaign on track is greatly appreciated. With your help, we’re going to create 100,000 new family-supporting jobs in industries of the future, build a world-class transportation system that connects communities statewide, combat climate change by making Maryland the first Net Zero state in the nation, and so much more.
Click here to help us meet our fundraising goals. Together, we’re going to secure a better and brighter future for Maryland’s communities in 2022. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keepusontrack?refcode=Active&amount=20.22]
Thank you,
Team Franchot
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keepusontrack?refcode=Active&amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648

clean_body: [ Peter -- Every weekend from now to Election Day, June 28, 2022, Team Franchot will be pounding the pavement and placing phone calls to reach out to the voters that will secure our victory. Here’s a great snapshot of Team Franchot volunteers in action from just a few days ago: [ don’t need to tell you that these smiling faces are a welcome sight after the hardships of this past year. As a state and as a nation, we’ve all suffered greatly during the COVID-19 pandemic. But we’re happy to see that change is right around the corner. The sun is shining, Maryland is slowly opening back up, and we’re once again holding in-person events and door-to-door canvassing. Hitting the doors is just one part of our expansive statewide strategy. To win this election, we have an aggressive ramp-up schedule planned in the coming months, and grassroots supporters like you are absolutely crucial to our success. We need your support to keep our fundraising goals on track, so that we can hire more organizers, open future field offices, print more campaign literature and yard signs, run more digital ads, and ultimately build the critical mass of support that will propel Peter Franchot to victory. Will you help us stay on track by chipping in to our campaign? body:
Rick Wilborn from McPherson here. I’m the Vice President of the Kansas State Senate, and I’m writing to you today to announce my whole-hearted endorse Friend, Rick Wilborn from McPherson here. I’m the Vice President of the Kansas State Senate, and I’m writing to you today to announce my whole-hearted endorsement of Derek Schmidt to be our next Governor of Kansas–**I hope I can count on you joining me in supporting Derek.** [](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=76a7fce13daf4aa196a1889654dbdeb3&_e=JUtcAYQgBwxHOw99nktrvPnn5v2abxOVK6u5TL4tSG64Y5ctCV7tgmJ9eCMnAgYeLbaBk2QhsFd0RVGXBnymfhVYcCju1qnmXFl8tFy_lfKv6vf6xY4icovOQm71LJ__V3k9Sn-trz3Oa-2T1TLVnsxCVvoV8v2hcmgm9XiejGLJxWvh2LraaflIRu5oK7NAHEpsx4HsrCMIObHDmC9zA3f_sN_LyrGoXGG1yKtnGHpYhfdhlrSXG81Cv_VQnq-oRj2fwqSSpSJqzUWOhWG_vCBrur6TXO-aRZ828lxE7bP6-_FDEEd-asupvtdoYSZ9EmDGo4C2vjv436AaflDCyHu1JqK8-wPl1PwiuwpzmLaMt3t6BbHZgk2zuPQWP8QD2FbaZWB3QBROAPDaZpae2nUDGXeFkIuZYLASA9nOZU9YEEVNGdzl48unV-JpkZz9evbMAXaXkco3a5fDycy3tA%3D%3D) I’ve known Derek since before I began serving in the Kansas Legislature. For as long as I’ve known him, he's always been a reliable leader who will get the job done for Kansas families. This is an important election coming up, and we need fresh new leadership in the governor's office to get our state back on track. Derek is the person for the job. **[Click here to chip in right away to help support his campaign >>>](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=76a7fce13daf4aa196a1889654dbdeb3&_e=JUtcAYQgBwxHOw99nktrvPnn5v2abxOVK6u5TL4tSG64Y5ctCV7tgmJ9eCMnAgYeLbaBk2QhsFd0RVGXBnymfhVYcCju1qnmXFl8tFy_lfKv6vf6xY4icovOQm71LJ__V3k9Sn-trz3Oa-2T1TLVnsxCVvoV8v2hcmgm9XiejGLJxWvh2LraaflIRu5oK7NAHEpsx4HsrCMIObHDmC9zA3f_sN_LyrGoXGG1yKtnGHq3cfDGX8HYVuQm-pGXysXYjqihPzGChzde7spXKYFZ0pG1JamQO9QaaN-8aEkdOoEY4WKVgAQSvWUc6Sdj89cjeOzk5VbmO_lHlzc1GgcbMe3PuSMskddrQyTiWqSZ14SbxXhVf129nONQOJ_qPe-166Nj7T4sFg6k1UP3HnzX0rxq0r2RFczb0EV18xNNGRljCe7cfx3FZ3ioVzR8KrIJSPLCX-bHRrYoPLFJS3JY6w%3D%3D)** Derek is a great conservative and a true winner at every turn. I know he has what it takes to defeat Laura Kelly, and we can't afford to risk another loss like 2018. Throughout his entire career, he’s never backed down from a tough fight. Will you help make Derek Schmidt our next Governor by chipping in a few dollars today? [**CHIP IN HERE**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=76a7fce13daf4aa196a1889654dbdeb3&_e=JUtcAYQgBwxHOw99nktrvPnn5v2abxOVK6u5TL4tSG64Y5ctCV7tgmJ9eCMnAgYeLbaBk2QhsFd0RVGXBnymfhVYcCju1qnmXFl8tFy_lfKv6vf6xY4icovOQm71LJ__V3k9Sn-trz3Oa-2T1TLVnsxCVvoV8v2hcmgm9XiejGLJxWvh2LraaflIRu5oK7NAHEpsx4HsrCMIObHDmC9zA3f_sN_LyrGoXGG1yKtnGHrGVFcZCjYFNOuzuO-GEYG8dCz5nRhiiPhV0oExthJZ5KhK6zvIi_siqJRH3M_b30FtUavcPNYQ5uXwaBsiUMl8wQTr1au1lWwl6DWvrPJCtw_0gXHN6KzpQ5KGPf5UEryudlvyaBtoO5iQhMLbz5L8zRb1MaKQKg0iPoJ1p6qhL4SZtvyhVnalelKHWDd9tORIbe_JB4FztRgpsfI7GY_optfQmve9bgi_AzE7cSQITg%3D%3D) This year, Derek was invaluable in helping us pass the most important pro-life legislation in recent memory in the Value Them Both amendment. Over the years as attorney general, he's returned millions of dollars to Kansas consumers by winning in the courts and he's kept our communities safe by always backing the blue and enforcing our criminal laws to the fullest extent. When Derek makes a promise, he keeps it. As Senate Vice President, I know how badly we need better leadership in the governor's office. As a longtime friend, I know Derek will stick to his word and get things done for our state. I hope you'll join me in choosing Derek Schmidt as our nominee to defeat Laura Kelly in 2022. [**Please, donate to his campaign today to help replace Laura Kelly and bring good conservative values back to Kansas.**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=76a7fce13daf4aa196a1889654dbdeb3&_e=JUtcAYQgBwxHOw99nktrvPnn5v2abxOVK6u5TL4tSG64Y5ctCV7tgmJ9eCMnAgYeLbaBk2QhsFd0RVGXBnymfhVYcCju1qnmXFl8tFy_lfKv6vf6xY4icovOQm71LJ__V3k9Sn-trz3Oa-2T1TLVnsxCVvoV8v2hcmgm9XiejGLJxWvh2LraaflIRu5oK7NAHEpsx4HsrCMIObHDmC9zA3f_sN_LyrGoXGG1yKtnGHrG1asnRds-_mSfLMIRCiKDVF5x8ZHa0zzVnuT7MH8uuc826i9EU6NrVIdGWx76RUcLI-xdOeQZI9yqBqL0hmuxoV6kEPm96NKRfAda5fUs8f_QJk3k8VZsY87ncLYrZj2ONpAG36077UT_a2KFVWVsqDdC98UrIjFIqlFEtIK8Nkhy7yxmrK7APffg7j2iKvRFxgwUrlOWL4Mpdj8H9E1E2bd6tLtFIsmNP0DN8Kutfg%3D%3D) [**DONATE HERE**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=76a7fce13daf4aa196a1889654dbdeb3&_e=JUtcAYQgBwxHOw99nktrvPnn5v2abxOVK6u5TL4tSG64Y5ctCV7tgmJ9eCMnAgYeLbaBk2QhsFd0RVGXBnymfhVYcCju1qnmXFl8tFy_lfKv6vf6xY4icovOQm71LJ__V3k9Sn-trz3Oa-2T1TLVnsxCVvoV8v2hcmgm9XiejGLJxWvh2LraaflIRu5oK7NAHEpsx4HsrCMIObHDmC9zA3f_sN_LyrGoXGG1yKtnGHoAkJqGr0WBg-9ygIFxubjp34lLfxmkTtvdrcfsaMoqLENCHjE4QMlUAX4ez44tExtsr0rOLGhQqwSLp5e7awE5SQ0AbtZH9L4sEdhQ5Yt5irl-dGdnMF1ojYoN5QiMVQORdJF3z0QJoAR6JK7poeO0paJA415S2TnZFm4r0Gb4Xmm1h4JfQqeqlBLxEdDOH2jNhu2hCqFTfKAJPFgWEbTMVTW4u7oZq_Iw4Hd_XO4uKg%3D%3D) Thanks for supporting Derek’s campaign, friend. name: Culp for Congress
subject: Congressman Newhouse Helping the Radical Left
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS
body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=BhqKdW&mc=JH&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EyNvJi9&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-5.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/e46c302c-55c0-403c-878c-21862ee27167.png]

Newhouse...working with the left on amnesty bills that will reward people who break the law!

We all know that the U.S.-Mexico border surge under Biden is dangerous for our country. We expect our elected public servants to stand with the American people, to stand with you, and protect the sovereignty of our nation.
You'd think that Congressman Newhouse who claims to be a "Republican" would understand that. President Trump gained so much support because of his stance on the border and how we wouldn't reward people for entering the country illegally.

Think about it. If someone broke into your home, set up a living space in your basement, and the government came in and declared they could legally stay there, you'd be pissed. That's what Dan Newhouse and Democrats are proposing with their "America Last" agenda.

Is Newhouse really siding with the Dems? Let's see.

Sure,Newhouse went and visited the border, and sympathized with the farmers and ranchers who live in constant danger because of the ever increasing amount of illegal activity. But back in Washing D.C. Newhouse is actively reaching out across the aisle.

Newhouse has been voting with the likes of Maxine Waters and Nancy Pelosi, on their co-sponsored "American Dream and Promise Act 2021." The Democrat sponsored bill would allow a path to amnesty and citizenship for people who broke the law and entered into our country illegally. Not only did Newhouse vote yes to the "American Dream Bill", Newhouse also was a co-sponsor to a bill titled "Farm Workforce Modernization Act 2021." His bill would allow a new immigration status calledcertified agricultural worker (CAW), and if the individuals who broke the law by entering into our country illegally met the proper requirements, would also be allowed a pathway to become an American citizen. If this wasn't bad enoughthe CAW status could possibly be extended to a spouse and children without the dependents having to meet qualifications. Read the RINO sponsored bill here. [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=S0rDaI&mc=JH&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EVv0CN0&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-5.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/f58dc87d-e808-4ac4-8cd0-f63ccc56c0f0.jpg]

How do you think the Hispanic voters feel about these issues?

Looking at the voting data it's clear that Hispanic voters flocked to the MAGA movement in the 2020 election. President Trump flipped a deeply blue county in Texas that has a population that is 94 percent Hispanic, gained 4 other blue counties, and made massive gains in 12 other counties. [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=S0rD43&mc=JH&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EF16Vqu&]Why do you think that is? Because voters recognize that President Trump was looking to protect the American people, and their communities.

The open border policy affects every state across the nation, including here in Washington State. In the 4th District agriculture is essential, and while Newhouse's bill is worded in a way to seem that he's on the farmer or rancher's side, he is actually undermining American citizens, and the immigrants who came here legally to pursue the American Dream.

What we can do?

Share this email with everyone you know, so they can see the truth about Newhouse, and read his bill. We need transparency in our public servants, and Newhouse has proved he's willing to mislead his constituents by titling a bill "Farm Workforce Modernization Act 2021" to make it seem pro-agriculture, when really it's a RINO backed amnesty bill.

We can make a difference if we all work together! I need your help today so we can raise the money we need to stop the "America Last" agenda and show the radical left that Americans like you and me want congress to follow our constitution and protect America's Sovereignty.

Honored to serve you,

Loren

I WILL STEP UP AND DO $50! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=S0raBS&mc=JH&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=ES2QhAf&]

Not only did Newhouse vote yes to the "American Dream Bill", Newhouse also was a co-sponsor to a bill titled "Farm Workforce Modernization Act 2021." His bill would allow a new immigration status calledcertified agricultural worker (CAW), and if the individuals who broke the law by entering into our country illegally met the proper requirements, would also be allowed a pathway to become an American citizen. If this wasn't bad enoughthe CAW status could possibly be extended to a spouse and children without the dependents having to meet qualifications. Read the RINO sponsored bill here. [&] [] How do you think the Hispanic voters feel about these issues? Looking at the voting data it's clear that Hispanic voters flocked to the MAGA movement in the 2020 election. President Trump flipped a deeply blue county in Texas that has a population that is 94 percent Hispanic, gained 4 other blue counties, and made massive gains in 12 other counties. [ do you think that is? Because voters recognize that President Trump was looking to protect the American people, and their communities. The open border policy affects every state across the nation, including here in Washington State. In the 4th District agriculture is essential, and while Newhouse's bill is worded in a way to seem that he's on the farmer or rancher's side, he is actually undermining American citizens, and the immigrants who came here legally to pursue the American Dream. What we can do? Share this email with everyone you know, so they can see the truth about Newhouse, and read his bill. We need transparency in our public servants, and Newhouse has proved he's willing to mislead his constituents by titling a bill "Farm Workforce Modernization Act 2021" to make it seem pro-agriculture, when really it's a RINO backed amnesty bill. We can make a difference if we all work together! I need your help today so we can raise the money we need to stop the "America Last" agenda and show the radical left that Americans like you and me want congress to follow our constitution and protect America's Sovereignty. Honored to serve you, Loren I CAN DO $25! [&] I WILL STEP UP AND DO $50! [&] THIS IS IMPORTANT. I CAN DO $100! [&] I CAN PLAY BIG LEAGUE AND DO $250! name: Tiffany Smiley
subject: I believe in term limits
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Friends,
I signed the U.S. Term Limits Pledge to sponsor term limits legislation when I am elected. Being a United States Senator should not be a career - it should be service to the people of Washington. And for almost 30 years Patty Murray has been sitting in D.C., not following through on any of her promises.
In 1992, Patty Murray was elected by Washingtonians to be your senator in the nation's capital. How do you think she's done? Has she represented your values? I think it's safe to say she's embraced a career and totally disregarded those who elected her. She has lost her chance to represent the people of Washington. It's time for a change! But it's going to take all of us to make that change!
---

At the end of the month, we have to submit our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission (FEC). Soon after, they will be released publicly. The groups running attack ads against Abigail will be paying close attention to our report, as will her potential Republican opponents. They are looking for signs of vulnerability, but you and I both know that with your help, they won't find them here!

With your help, we can raise the resources to defend Abigail's work and push back against these attacks. Whitney Holt

His irresponsible leadership could have devastating consequences to the health of his constituents, but Ron Johnson doesn't care. Never has, never will. Folks, it's always Ron Johnson first, Wisconsin second. name: Laura Loomer
subject: Lying for money . . .
body:
Politicians disgust me.
| | | [](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/m8jtsSQWu2QcXUXdzYsZhA/L6gCzLmKOoIfxYhtKkZQvA)
Patriot,

Politicians disgust me.

Whether dealing with members of Congress or local politicians, the vast majority of the men and women we elect will completely change who they are and what they stand for when someone throws a few dollars their way.

And this happens every . . . single . . . day.

To prove this, [**I recently confronted my local elections supervisor**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/m8jtsSQWu2QcXUXdzYsZhA/L6gCzLmKOoIfxYhtKkZQvA), Wendy Sartory Link.

Wendy's an interesting political animal.

She was sold to Floridians as a conservative independent when appointed by Governor Ron DeSantis.

She then ran as a Democrat in 2020.

Then, to solidify her standing in the Democrat Party, she accepted $6.8 million from Facebook CEO Mark Zuckerberg, a significant amount of money that influenced the outcome of the 2020 Elections in Palm Beach County.

Honestly, I don't give a damn about her party affiliation. I care about character.

Posing as a conservative to catch the governor's eye, then going full Democrat and taking money from Zuckerberg (and then lying about it when confronted) shows a total lack of character.

[**Watch Wendy as I confront her**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/m8jtsSQWu2QcXUXdzYsZhA/L6gCzLmKOoIfxYhtKkZQvA) but be sure to keep reading after you click as I have more to say:

[**Continued . . .**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/m8jtsSQWu2QcXUXdzYsZhA/L6gCzLmKOoIfxYhtKkZQvA)

Peter,

I’m a little worried for the future of Oregon’s 4th district and let me tell you why. The Democrats are going to do whatever they can to keep the seat and that means they’re coming after me in full force, so Peter, I need your help to fight back.

The problem I’ve run into is that June marks the end of the second fundraising quarter and at the pace we’re raising money this month, **[I’m most assuredly going to fall short of raising $100,000, which as you may recall is the goal we set at the beginning of the month](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=2a915f261ba84c15ba6f90cdeb1d09de&_e=h8cO2z34N0-eSZ9bdsR5Qh2lhvkYsIy0ZiSHaW_JV8a_zK1WrRCWo--XGpuOM7thJMG_NESdT667J7xvZrfA3q4dxaH6EvimeLxJzzFEc56Y6MgXqrEadqlPkbiFqUtszBbFqkNtjirwnT0KNoeFjUSCMc83O1dMyvUdOY33fTu7QZGhPsxy4dDlViSMIAANywMaomfj_xVZXk0503C8o_zRVfXLbmZkOkki8J-HJbXU2rG_6_MkrODHuzbKJjwwimPsmNU3Cas0N68SCLmMO38SkXr4o_JgPafc3Ykks08XWzbkydl6iO4tr30_CQ1eoejfPGsSrorVRSr_TSumBpDrxuFUZxVftBOfYflQCEy07XNeaiMZHbUEYEDNf3OhtKvnPLGHsl8Lw1axBdQB2kJ305v9S-JA6xuMMV_eAChZb9jAoqXs23etQPkM8EUX)**.

If I don’t reach this goal, I’m not going to have the funds to push back against the attacks Democrats are launching against me, **[and I won’t be able to report to the RNC that we raised enough money in June to qualify for their “on the radar”](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=2a915f261ba84c15ba6f90cdeb1d09de&_e=h8cO2z34N0-eSZ9bdsR5Qh2lhvkYsIy0ZiSHaW_JV8a_zK1WrRCWo--XGpuOM7thJMG_NESdT667J7xvZrfA3q4dxaH6EvimeLxJzzFEc56Y6MgXqrEadqlPkbiFqUtszBbFqkNtjirwnT0KNoeFjUSCMc83O1dMyvUdOY33fTu7QZGhPsxy4dDlViSMIAANywMaomfj_xVZXk0503C8o_zRVfXLbmZkOkki8J-HJbXLBrsbgw6tnqUvKFfbye6sbYOEJdSxQ9a6AMTOKp2IYyY6Wtk_T-b08shO37nQUfmR0OskADQ0md_tViNuwHMzUw9I-hKwpaAaHPR8iKYJCnq84H_iQOcbQmln5H1onxOoDuIrsrc1R7fcoYvdOlyKiu5bkfJOiUvtNxNEihVJtAHY8qCFz5KpMSLbXkf5RL83tjg2AyuEjTDoUdYjvugZ)** program which supports promising candidates around the country.

Thinking about the consequences of the Democrats holding my Oregon district has been keeping me up at night.**[I’m redoubling my efforts in order for us to hit this lofty goal, but I will surely come up short without YOUR HELP](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=2a915f261ba84c15ba6f90cdeb1d09de&_e=h8cO2z34N0-eSZ9bdsR5Qh2lhvkYsIy0ZiSHaW_JV8a_zK1WrRCWo--XGpuOM7thJMG_NESdT667J7xvZrfA3q4dxaH6EvimeLxJzzFEc56Y6MgXqrEadqlPkbiFqUtszBbFqkNtjirwnT0KNoeFjUSCMc83O1dMyvUdOY33fTu7QZGhPsxy4dDlViSMIAANywMaomfj_xVZXk0503C8o_zRVfXLbmZkOkki8J-HJbXZza5_wAW0itY1WUXznQkBzPljLPTEGfCRLCTB04QGrTm_dGEw86psnMbEChT9BXHMuG-gdk-koCm5iehytnvIBxz1lo9oqvNMxDRyyihRTD3_G6OL2_vA1-C9g9si9iLhHcS-3_PfwdtUT8lXmWOc5rEakv9cMumBCWqt3aG9_SkleIJm8S61GbTXize8T7Y0pGW2svp2yyjuJ250op0I)**. The Left is bringing in new, big-money donors in droves right, and we're being left in the dust. Now, **we only have a few weeks remaining before we have to report our quarterly donations and show the strength of my fundraising operation in the days since I entered this race**.

**[What I need from you is your pledge to make a donation before the end of the month, can you help me with this?](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=2a915f261ba84c15ba6f90cdeb1d09de&_e=h8cO2z34N0-eSZ9bdsR5Qh2lhvkYsIy0ZiSHaW_JV8a_zK1WrRCWo--XGpuOM7thJMG_NESdT667J7xvZrfA3q4dxaH6EvimeLxJzzFEc56Y6MgXqrEadqlPkbiFqUtszBbFqkNtjirwnT0KNoeFjUSCMc83O1dMyvUdOY33fTu7QZGhPsxy4dDlViSMIAANywMaomfj_xVZXk0503C8o_zRVfXLbmZkOkki8J-HJbV-m9YRX4pBiWk0MnasYXlOgxRdsgOh9E-2paGFhxH24UYCbRO3M0GmtkHIqdE8wozSVhiIp7Kjmdaud8mvayq7zG1i_LdpN8jV7tjSmGLTZ73u3iFsbrJykThgGSGeVuQjrqXlQTQF9w9fN2k-JpDB7aE_6Whxa3V-mRA553gRv6L26r3LC-xOgZabmoA-CQtTgHum9R1VeZtGdXahRzlg)**

I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Peter, I’m a little worried for the future of Oregon’s 4th district and let me tell you why. The Democrats are going to do whatever they can to keep the seat and that means they’re coming after me in full force, so Peter, I need your help to fight back. The problem I’ve run into is that June marks the end of the second fundraising quarter and at the pace we’re raising money this month, . If I don’t reach this goal, I’m not going to have the funds to push back against the attacks Democrats are launching against me, program which supports promising candidates around the country. Thinking about the consequences of the Democrats holding my Oregon district has been keeping me up at night.. Can I get you to send in just $5 or $10 to help ensure that I can fight back against the Left this summer? The quarterly deadline is two weeks from today. We’re running out of time ... quickly. | PLEASE CHIP-IN These fundraising goals are no joke! It’s crucial to the future of my campaign that we meet our goal before the June 30th deadline. The Left is bringing in new, big-money donors in droves right, and we're being left in the dust. Now, we only have a few weeks remaining before we have to report our quarterly donations and show the strength of my fundraising operation in the days since I entered this race. It may not seem like much but if I can get everyone who has donated to my campaign so far this quarter to send in just a few bucks, I can show the Left that Oregon isn’t their safe haven anymore. If you can help me and make this pledge, you will be playing in instrumental role in flipping this seat RED and helping me get back into the good graces I enjoyed with the national Party last year. Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. name: Winsome Sears, Republican
subject: Critical Race Theory = Nonsense
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WINSOME SEARS FOR LIEUTENANT GOVERNOR**
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c133%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=RPusV9y2bClTb6HoITKapA&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3320%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nGCXzwOSPeLHHNt7o%2bhSNA&sysid=1 "Headline") Fellow Conservative: Critical race theory teaches children to view white people and white families as inherently bad and racist. It is nonsense and we cannot allow our schools to teach it to our children under the banner of “social justice.” Liberals claim to support this blatantly racist policy to “help” people like me - a Black American, but they do it to encourage racial division. **_That is how they stay in power._** I’m Winsome Sears. I am a mother, wife, effective legislator, Marine (_Oorah_), Black Conservative, and candidate for statewide office in the Commonwealth of Virginia. **[Will you help a proud, Black, Conservative woman win her election and lead the fight against critical race theory with your donation of $25, $50, or $100 today?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3321%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IfIQWhNKrB47kwnO7vusAQ&sysid=1 "Will you help a proud, Black, Conservative woman win her election and lead
the fight against critical race theory with your donation of $25, $50, or $100
today?")** **Liberals know that once Black America throws off the government Democrats have forced on them, they will be out on[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3322%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=phJxUWG6j7MkI7Uudm35Hw&sysid=1 "Winsome Sears Interview")their collective butts. They use the schools and the media to keep us divided.** In fact, I have been underestimated my whole life - in the Marine Corp, in business, and in politics. Democrats see me and they think they have me figured out. **[I was on Fox News recently to discuss this issue, and I hope you can take a look.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3323%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cj6R2ZwLbfJ4lXtI30FzWA&sysid=1 "I was on Fox News recently to discuss this issue, and I hope you can take a
look.")** The Republican principles of God, Freedom, and Family are the values of Black America. If we can educate these voters on the facts without the media’s interference, we can secure a Republican majority for generations. **[That won’t happen if we don’t start right here, right now. Your donation to my campaign of at least $50 will be the genesis for a new movement that will last for years.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3324%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fG0btn4WIBhA9W9ZNi8pig&sysid=1 "That won’t happen if we don’t start right here, right now. Your donation
to my campaign of at least $50 will be the genesis for a new movement that will
last for years.")** **With you standing beside me, the Democrats are in for a BIG surprise.** I am ready to be the light that illuminates the way for millions of minority voters to find the Republican Party, and with your support, we shall overcome. **[Will you join me?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3335%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rZQy95%2bQ93kIVbl%2bIiPseg&sysid=1 "Will you join me?")** For the next generation, [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3336%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4422V7tIS77Ucpqny8KSdg&sysid=1 "Winsome Sears")
Winsome Sears
Patriot for Lieutenant Governor
---
| **PAID FOR BY WINSOME SEARS FOR LIEUTENANT GOVERNOR**
---

# "Someone who lies about the little things will lie about the big things too"
# \- Terry McAuliffe
---

PolitiFact says Terry’s biggest lie is being so dishonest about his record as governor that he deserved their worst rating, “PANTS ON FIRE!” [Click here to read it for yourself.](https://hk.t.hubspotemail.net/e2t/tc/VWqwWj2c2TBBW2myQTD43y3psW2x7JLQ4sVSlbN89-QC13lGn_V1-WJV7CgYcCW4PZrBg6X3w-LW3_grlT62Qgp8W6xk0x17sNNsmW1fnVC12pj9dDW2nb9Yd8F2mpnW31FWc96W26LtW8QCbYF6nbsJwW2gClGk2lw7C0W1hYlRz1gvDqwW2rNPH65-5bxxVty6Zq8d2krfW5NMpZ66FGTB4W2pKxYs7BBqm7N4f3m5jKh9FTW4VbdTQ7H504YN7VpsH8kMgKDW3P83VJ4X28q6N3zhh_PSZpLJW7hQcPy4Ch0CFW552Fx95gXs0BW6jFC1j1pXKgsW3RZh_b2YlT_yW84jlRV5S2YNRW4WPn9Q83p9QHW8pk87z2bpvM_W2KX4cj69VsX3W7VCcZy6n1zz5W4FWh217r6fpRVssk6Y1Xf64hW7xxpbh1N6Ql83ft_1)

Two-Faced Terry is going to keep lying, and we are going to need your help so that we can defend ourselves and get the truth out. I’ve been working in politics for decades, but I’ve never seen anything like what just played out on the floor of Congress. Rep. Scott Perry and his fellow seditionists — including Marjorie Taylor Greene, Lauren Boebert, and Matt Gaetz — just voted against giving a Gold medal to the Capitol Hill Police who fought to keep our democracy safe during the mob attack on January 6th.
Friend, I’ve been working in politics for decades, but I’ve never seen anything like what just played out on the Floor of Congress. Rep. Scott Perry and his fellow seditionists — including Marjorie Taylor Greene, Lauren Boebert, and Matt Gaetz — just voted against giving a Congressional Gold medal to the heroic Capitol Hill Police who fought to keep our democracy safe during the mob attack on January 6th. **_More than 140 Capitol Police were injured and one officer, Brian Sicknick, died while defending the seat of our government. But when presented with the chance to honor them for their valor and their sacrifices, Perry spat in their faces._** **“It’s all politics, it’s all garbage,”** said Perry to a _POLITICO_ reporter after his vote. name: Nuestro PAC
subject: Texas is on the frontline of our fight against climate change
body:
This is what happens when the government and companies put profits over people. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30909067/291005194/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmNWQ5YzQ3LWQ5Y2UtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=P1mc63L9mKGh9DByQ9_qPm30qERIjM-xmSdU0zlVnHs=&emci=ccc8da59-d4ce-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=4f5d9c47-d9ce-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7684583) Friend, Once again, Texas is on the frontline of our fight against climate change. Earlier this week, the Electric Reliability Council of Texas - which operates the state’s electric grid - [advised residents to reduce their energy consumption](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30909069/291005196/-69712234?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmNWQ5YzQ3LWQ5Y2UtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=P1mc63L9mKGh9DByQ9_qPm30qERIjM-xmSdU0zlVnHs=&emci=ccc8da59-d4ce-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=4f5d9c47-d9ce-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7684583) in light of the early heat wave blanketing the state. This comes just months after Texas’ electric grid failed during winter storms. As climate change continues to affect weather patterns around the world, people like those in Texas will be the first to feel the effects. And it doesn’t help when our government and wealthy corporations put their pocketbooks ahead of the wellbeing and safety of our people. Some politicians, like Ted Cruz, have long prevented action on climate change at the national level. Meanwhile, state politicians have long failed to prepare for or address the consequences of extreme weather. We can’t keep waiting on the same old politicians to act. Earlier this year, we participated in the special election in Texas’ sixth congressional district because we know that we need stronger leadership in Congress to address these life threatening risks. Together, we can continue to push leaders and affect the outcomes of elections to make our politicians accountable to the people they represent, not the corporate interests funding their campaigns. **[Can you please make a contribution - of any amount you can afford - to Nuestro PAC today and help us make our politicians act on climate change now?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30909071/291005198/1931195567?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmNWQ5YzQ3LWQ5Y2UtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=P1mc63L9mKGh9DByQ9_qPm30qERIjM-xmSdU0zlVnHs=)** Thank you for chipping in. It means a lot. In Solidarity, Nuestro PAC [**CONTRIBUTE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30909073/291005200/1931195567?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmNWQ5YzQ3LWQ5Y2UtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=P1mc63L9mKGh9DByQ9_qPm30qERIjM-xmSdU0zlVnHs=) | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30909074/291005202/1606361776?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmNWQ5YzQ3LWQ5Y2UtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=P1mc63L9mKGh9DByQ9_qPm30qERIjM-xmSdU0zlVnHs=&emci=ccc8da59-d4ce-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=4f5d9c47-d9ce-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7684583) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30909075/291005203/-565481902?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRmNWQ5YzQ3LWQ5Y2UtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=P1mc63L9mKGh9DByQ9_qPm30qERIjM-xmSdU0zlVnHs=&emci=ccc8da59-d4ce-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=4f5d9c47-d9ce-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7684583)

name: Eric Holcomb
subject: fwd: We’re almost at the halfway point of 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
June is shaping up to be another banner month for Hoosiers with Governor Holcomb’s leadership delivering more record results across the board. Friend, June is shaping up to be another banner month for Hoosiers with Governor Holcomb’s leadership delivering more record results across the board. The great Indiana comeback is in full swing, and we’re counting on Hoosiers like you to keep the momentum going as we get ready to close out the first half of 2021. **That’s why Eric reached out to you earlier this week –– and I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss it!** Friend, every dollar invested in Indiana’s future goes a long way to creating more opportunities for growth and success down the road. **[Can we count on you to pitch in just $5 today to help get the job done?](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=fe7a874f839744ff9f580a7ff759d15f&_e=NFG7iD7RzcAJQx4DqZBN4eBpB7A9OS5t8lEBz7yxoXzyT9fyJNTM8ObIbPuiaEHYzh37o7NyqkNUAMahxeGhJbc0M6HEx7KnR8VwdrUEzKTuEgI_-_IYUeiqOpvKyCIwW_f3oAxiWx9LHHLef5DfjF9V7vzvtNSXV9mN5PPFDZwoLcN_5Cw0DjhrEJEmKcbBhWmnPqtfantugNMstfCHi4zxI5msNIT2hy4yIqrVYyAGj2zphYQdJxqbrXUtMLbW8fDrndM7v-M7iL4di4tr2aNOALLkQdcvmy_MOfnT5psYlMkJXM38HjAiRvqbVnE6Twsx4CnGgDhtUz8yZS62CvCcl7_DV5ZUG6PMnPW1pLW6RGAH4MVR-mZpIVOKmOVGJXnUM0DTFU9aR-05qKAUjsvpyDaDF62pU-B30b402z1puRDfZV55God2q1U-nD5pe8HAZMb3C_rxlE3RlqMKFwHDCjlsD42hTXCEONvhOmI%3D)** [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=fe7a874f839744ff9f580a7ff759d15f&_e=NFG7iD7RzcAJQx4DqZBN4eBpB7A9OS5t8lEBz7yxoXzyT9fyJNTM8ObIbPuiaEHYzh37o7NyqkNUAMahxeGhJRMLiBXVLTZjc28RYwkiRWUUB4U0PAiAVaP9EihhY53CA9xxzNSPF1vpWja2D0-_2yHZ9rxY68kgJkpmic94bimbEIsoW6EuFHelM6jzwTKTdVsvoBTyYpFgc_CtmmHuoUUmuI-espYko1reRj6sDcsWlfBA33V0sh-Z4xGidZN_dmGRXZA3EVnk9qkXc_Zer1hWoHA7fTLa8Q57woRyQxHES9t96CUp9X2--Q4gEdwjN9YLRBBVV01JAEaf_pTw4yCn-L58_f5BHN5LblGL7DgcMAy_c2WEPaAjP1N683eLtOITxuQ-XcO3btVn9IEJv7fX-JfWzK-LIx84hy_pFHDGWgOBel9Ivp8H3SupxH31IbXo8Ha8_OHdY2Z6TWerIEiSxQWRS399D7Gu3BS0kTE%3D) Subject: Time to roll up our sleeves and keep going From: Eric Holcomb [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=fe7a874f839744ff9f580a7ff759d15f&_e=NFG7iD7RzcAJQx4DqZBN4eBpB7A9OS5t8lEBz7yxoXzyT9fyJNTM8ObIbPuiaEHYzh37o7NyqkNUAMahxeGhJRMLiBXVLTZjc28RYwkiRWUUB4U0PAiAVaP9EihhY53CA9xxzNSPF1vpWja2D0-_2yHZ9rxY68kgJkpmic94bimbEIsoW6EuFHelM6jzwTKTdVsvoBTyYpFgc_CtmmHuoUUmuI-espYko1reRj6sDcsWlfBA33V0sh-Z4xGidZN_dmGRXZA3EVnk9qkXc_Zer7FP_1WPJ9XmqpksSyUAlv8Ioz7kF7z8JdcNeut6lmJKj9BGhEgQZ_PmnGq7zZbNkBGKGjPCDi0hX1l_DJHIYuwMGaHbHjLLqv7cT2QDVjI1QBcndNZdGJXUbIe4a0Qi-dkULaDW-930QuTiFcaiGraKUgWd0EKctogffZ7qTHC6hbCyXFSKvR_bD3DRoCWRj2U-9NaqX3YSYoL2zFnGg_Y%3D) Friend, Over the past few weeks I’ve traveled all over the state to cut ribbons, meet Hoosiers, and break ground on new, exciting projects bringing incredible opportunities to Indiana. More and more businesses are choosing to call Indiana home, Hoosiers are on the move again with massive infrastructure projects being completed, and we’re invested in our future like never before. For years, we’ve been dedicated to taking Indiana to the next level. Now, everywhere I look, I see the results of our work –– and that tells me two things: **What we’re doing is working.** **We need to keep pressing forward.** Friend, as proud as I am of what I see unfolding across our great state, this is no time to kick our feet up and call it a job well done. _In fact, now is the time for the exact opposite._ **Now is the time to roll up our sleeves and keep building One Indiana for ALL.** We need to keep the momentum going strong, and we need all Hoosier hands on deck to make it happen. There’s not a single doubt in my mind that the sky's the limit for Indiana right now, and there’s no telling what we will accomplish next with your help. [**Friend, will you pitch in $5, $10, or any other amount to help take Indiana to the next level?**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=fe7a874f839744ff9f580a7ff759d15f&_e=NFG7iD7RzcAJQx4DqZBN4eBpB7A9OS5t8lEBz7yxoXzyT9fyJNTM8ObIbPuiaEHYzh37o7NyqkNUAMahxeGhJWHjb99_jMLjVItypb-bYR6_-XvxXgspCNZ5jcmB9-cpzuylV8yvh8TX4odxmtwjsGNqzhBtLuEBVN0KgF9dftd2b22PfeoKIx61vC3yjCv_QpVr_rWu4l67YmogmY6oyIcg3YkRv7L5nsQPeqcFlHiO-F9zUZn0wdwu7bb0iGHjRTpeD3-E01oOpsHm4fdJ48Z-ci1h2eu3YUZADeTc5HX6wkYWd-PTNBYk6BHCUIikbvMGTeBMuAk2RULOG-tQeXaAEZFlWvO7VkdP654_12UJHjHay7tnOEq8y1MdcWaJd864enNIqxo7WlNnw4_vyaAJszdkd7hegmKR6WA5iSuOvHO-NQfDCIbQlLFylw_nTdIAE_JRHwRcSV-8KK7dSmzso1AvztU33cNxRj7lzwg%3D)[](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=fe7a874f839744ff9f580a7ff759d15f&_e=NFG7iD7RzcAJQx4DqZBN4eBpB7A9OS5t8lEBz7yxoXzyT9fyJNTM8ObIbPuiaEHYo5tiudOcswXqlFXs3ScKSOS_GIX6pkfv3JB9V-3b1EURTiLcwEAZnXNDicIvGZ4fYtEJCsFg9wzAcj274BRcuPrM5if3KeHS6wosKuXQkUbIPc8Emxn_gVfIoL4ZsiUVa7cu50LNOfRqSCafqCAvxny9w9DsO9a7NEXq164s9OFJhGWCvYLXz55YAq231rYX5XP9S9x9dCtLknTbAg3C0WRDkWjL5t7G93oBWZmOmVvsGiYRVWp-k3u3vP03iGOaW8Tm-s_wInewcO-oyLiEzlWCjZQEenj9B2mRiB8K0Na7EKZ7PRuJYQ9VJ4ZgY5_rSVJ3evcbSeT5QMn3Z57wbnvCD2I5GTrw-7VuFhBqSZ3RcZrARuOYIFHaewDr1zvIZcK_xA4R54Fhl1EbCZuCdqQKn_j9UqJR18XjpMtgyXs%3D) Thanks, Jake Oakman \------------ Forwarded Message ------------ To: Subject: Time to roll up our sleeves and keep going From: Eric Holcomb Friend, Over the past few weeks I’ve traveled all over the state to cut ribbons, meet Hoosiers, and break ground on new, exciting projects bringing incredible opportunities to Indiana. More and more businesses are choosing to call Indiana home, Hoosiers are on the move again with massive infrastructure projects being completed, and we’re invested in our future like never before. For years, we’ve been dedicated to taking Indiana to the next level. Now, everywhere I look, I see the results of our work –– and that tells me two things: What we’re doing is working. We need to keep pressing forward. Friend, as proud as I am of what I see unfolding across our great state, this is no time to kick our feet up and call it a job well done. In fact, now is the time for the exact opposite. Now is the time to roll up our sleeves and keep building One Indiana for ALL. We need to keep the momentum going strong, and we need all Hoosier hands on deck to make it happen. There’s not a single doubt in my mind that the sky's the limit for Indiana right now, and there’s no telling what we will accomplish next with your help. Thank you, Eric Holcomb | Contributions by corporations and labor organizations are limited to $5,000 annually; contributions by individuals, LLCs and political committees are unlimited. Contributions are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited. You may also contribute by check made out to "Eric Holcomb For Indiana" and mailed to 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN 46204. | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2019. name: MarkKelly.com
subject: This doesn’t happen often
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends — this isn’t the news we wanted to share, but we fell short of our mid-month fundraising goal yesterday.
We want to be upfront, this doesn’t happen often. But our goal was to get 10,000 donations and we still need 2,616 more to close the gap to make up for lost ground.
**So we’re emailing you for $5 to help close the gap.
You see, this campaign is fueled by small dollar donations from every day folks — not corporate PACs.
That’s why when we set goals like this, they’re real. Which means we can’t afford to come up even a dollar short.
So in order to hit our public FEC fundraising goal at the end of the month, we need to get the remaining 2,616 donations to stay on track.
Every dollar we raise now will put us in the best possible position to put up a big number at the end of the month. So we have to ask:
[**Will you make a $3 contribution today towards our June FEC deadline? This is important. We can’t afford to come up short when Mark already has three Republican opponents in the race trying to take back this seat.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210616-1-15&t=2&refcode2=813_6688874_HFK3Gy&akid=813%2E6688874%2EHFK3Gy)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Peter,

body:
For six years I hunted islamic terrorists in norther Africa who perpetrated the attacks on Benghazi. Now, I'm running for Congress Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=50fa01d843a040119b44692b28dcc328&_t=_0EFoFM0lrxOAX48LSvq9vbDFg76zfRcGFXSkJjt4DH3KSWvsOcjpB1hfx11cCwn-Z7yfB3h58f5OTO8-1B4fDbnJdqdhvpkhKOJnduoI2-HBLPdraBLjG4MrAO96hOPZYpDE4K7vQfhl9IKzZ8Sb7C-dNtcrJESgd3F8bSFFBY%3D) | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=50fa01d843a040119b44692b28dcc328&_e=HwkJyX6lYRucrBLGf4mXEHfpWtX2_084dPELRyJuiS1QL-LnDcOhlvGOw3Ioc9W5TO_kt4K2oOSXntADsh2Rv8-gWDKFYATVXiPCQsh1BqXqSREc4n0VFxy5pQOHF8KAIKvvHPOedlpUvppKcrS0691xAHBlJ0XeuKiusBCKOfXB306fxBtFtqjLi2Cq7D7qeO05a4Jn01ooD6B4sV3S_3qlJ4qCGyMfhlDxzcZkUv9X0fi_dIipGTcQSXn6MyYhqyqNgzRenDwNK25sTWSk5P1Au_oV9ISgVFNCllw0sy2MNb-jTRjSF_V1pxBONbevMY-X0M_1ad0Wviafc8R-YIrV4HcBA_KQ9GBkbx5oMKh6UekwW431GjSQKrmBehc9ZTtzH593y9xiz2Mtx1xRPR9EReDH7KQNRHnhM_J0oV7Mgitcm9KCvYcRc-8TxHR_zP6-0sxDOERaZR0Muf6RjI_XG7jPRZ1of9mT5l7fu0g%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox **I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today.**

I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.**I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own**.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=50fa01d843a040119b44692b28dcc328&_e=HwkJyX6lYRucrBLGf4mXEHfpWtX2_084dPELRyJuiS1QL-LnDcOhlvGOw3Ioc9W5TO_kt4K2oOSXntADsh2Rv8-gWDKFYATVXiPCQsh1BqXqSREc4n0VFxy5pQOHF8KAIKvvHPOedlpUvppKcrS0691xAHBlJ0XeuKiusBCKOfXB306fxBtFtqjLi2Cq7D7qeO05a4Jn01ooD6B4sV3S_3qlJ4qCGyMfhlDxzcZkUv9X0fi_dIipGTcQSXn6MyYhqyqNgzRenDwNK25sTWSk5HKxd0YIPqLqjIW91s9R1qJWifzbayPknptg9gxBBUB00TyRca4fF6DReBWmMUYSOWrwapWaPOLCqAXBCF5xiJrgaEqkBjJYT99X0F-3BL79o7aMGsq0iRQpMzbF5FAqJzRalVbkkG0j-V5DQMLvKEDqsQRDRC7k9bKfSWlOEqbD1GmwevQV238-uwzviBdiN-arjeU3JBGr1pTdBM0BfOU%3D)

Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency **[I gave up my career in the intelligence service- along with my security clearance - to run for Congress](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=50fa01d843a040119b44692b28dcc328&_e=HwkJyX6lYRucrBLGf4mXEHfpWtX2_084dPELRyJuiS1QL-LnDcOhlvGOw3Ioc9W5TO_kt4K2oOSXntADsh2Rv8-gWDKFYATVXiPCQsh1BqXqSREc4n0VFxy5pQOHF8KAIKvvHPOedlpUvppKcrS0691xAHBlJ0XeuKiusBCKOfXB306fxBtFtqjLi2Cq7D7qeO05a4Jn01ooD6B4sV3S_3qlJ4qCGyMfhlDxzcZkUv9X0fi_dIipGTcQSXn6MyYhqyqNgzRenDwNK25sTWSk5H12DoB5XK1EIFr_XDLrzXazsAi7Y5h2a2oElLTaQtUnb8_cfM6q_s9XxhcFLw9l9VcB3D14HlFXrLjV6682IzASH35dgCImZv6gptputTvSTSnDfSine-df2x6sjPBdYtxNmFt1htiYrxpbH5cjc82ixrItNYkCyXbOy6DQ8edI-sxrESkyXgG0cFrGItX2jp2_ivE8exfzqetKtuj0WAY%3D)**. I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price.

If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.**As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable** , and in a moment, [**I’m going to humbly ask for your financial assistance regarding my campaign.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=50fa01d843a040119b44692b28dcc328&_e=HwkJyX6lYRucrBLGf4mXEHfpWtX2_084dPELRyJuiS1QL-LnDcOhlvGOw3Ioc9W5TO_kt4K2oOSXntADsh2Rv8-gWDKFYATVXiPCQsh1BqXqSREc4n0VFxy5pQOHF8KAIKvvHPOedlpUvppKcrS0691xAHBlJ0XeuKiusBCKOfXB306fxBtFtqjLi2Cq7D7qeO05a4Jn01ooD6B4sV3S_3qlJ4qCGyMfhlDxzcZkUv9X0fi_dIipGTcQSXn6MyYhqyqNgzRenDwNK25sTWSk5AY_8onzeshWWaNdEF12BfIDKAvcgLArQb4bazT2cwxgtwifSYTFHSw6TbZv-w_VDfOIJ7AH9mPpft_EG9fZEDSNbNlf3nvJIEB5dT2NCHe6C3S_aM6RhIz5bSkD4lWl3nQJz9VqTuEukxTkA8bDc2juUv_4ymRIkWXPWr485zF3UBnTJDdayhJP0phJp5SZaqixir_LF68T-AheFmZIau8%3D)

You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, _**who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades**_ - along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel.

**This political assassination made my blood boil**. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me - even in the worst of times - that our freedom isn't free at all. _**We have to fight for it**_.

| [**HELP ME FIGHT FOR _YOU_
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=50fa01d843a040119b44692b28dcc328&_e=HwkJyX6lYRucrBLGf4mXEHfpWtX2_084dPELRyJuiS1QL-LnDcOhlvGOw3Ioc9W5TO_kt4K2oOSXntADsh2Rv8-gWDKFYATVXiPCQsh1BqXqSREc4n0VFxy5pQOHF8KAIKvvHPOedlpUvppKcrS0691xAHBlJ0XeuKiusBCKOfXB306fxBtFtqjLi2Cq7D7qeO05a4Jn01ooD6B4sV3S_3qlJ4qCGyMfhlDxzcZkUv9X0fi_dIipGTcQSXn6MyYhqyqNgzRenDwNK25sTWSk5Kkz4ZVc2NVpb7mdJNzF8QWm8X5f9PgyzCDCOxw7iv9yYPKBq-8kI1Q0NxAeTEY5cjqoFSe2L_KzCKsqC3nRtX3QIvY9sXMQWA6FrbvK2-3aGaab-TbBI1jwlK2jw7--BcTnO5G55BnHxKdDPfjp8aqmQfEFCkEZNmHrLOcQUMBm8qB6zXEe61vnY8RndpEe8wRUGEg2Xg-SelW2p78DR2U%3D)
---

Depending on who you ask, the Benghazi attack was either a random attack or a pre-meditated campaign of murder. But the fact of the matter is this: An American ambassador was killed in the line of duty and politicians pointed fingers at each other over who was responsible. That BS is the reason **[I’m running for Congress, and today I’m asking if you’ll chip-in $5 or $10 to help me get my campaign off the ground.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=50fa01d843a040119b44692b28dcc328&_e=HwkJyX6lYRucrBLGf4mXEHfpWtX2_084dPELRyJuiS1QL-LnDcOhlvGOw3Ioc9W5TO_kt4K2oOSXntADsh2Rv8-gWDKFYATVXiPCQsh1BqXqSREc4n0VFxy5pQOHF8KAIKvvHPOedlpUvppKcrS0691xAHBlJ0XeuKiusBCKOfXB306fxBtFtqjLi2Cq7D7qeO05a4Jn01ooD6B4sV3S_3qlJ4qCGyMfhlDxzcZkUv9X0fi_dIipGTcQSXn6MyYhqyqNgzRenDwNK25sTWSk5L46k8wtZG9JSk6AEPVjEIk4vzRduMoVd1wEk-k1C5mKrc1qY95w_ZSvBYaI72CAS1ZldQT51hmj6KiOFRtJ4uDn_X-ge1u_2nCfOUkyWAjhv3sBP2vU_Plds0o2-Y_7pY4zGZT4YstlXxOBgYPqZHwzB4fYJ_7evmBwdOti_oH7NML60v6HUTaE4r1RRYhqd1bvbGRax8yfhrjZTcOYSGI%3D) **

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=50fa01d843a040119b44692b28dcc328&_e=HwkJyX6lYRucrBLGf4mXEHfpWtX2_084dPELRyJuiS1QL-LnDcOhlvGOw3Ioc9W5TO_kt4K2oOSXntADsh2Rv8-gWDKFYATVXiPCQsh1BqXqSREc4n0VFxy5pQOHF8KAIKvvHPOedlpUvppKcrS0691xAHBlJ0XeuKiusBCKOfXB306fxBtFtqjLi2Cq7D7qeO05a4Jn01ooD6B4sV3S_3qlJ4qCGyMfhlDxzcZkUv9X0fi_dIipGTcQSXn6MyYhqyqNgzRenDwNK25sTWSk5Lk7IO83DW8Kc164V3tuTDntUtRd_4PNOSQYIgLkDtTZZAzHFkNPwTFSGXnEWjS2XJ4XdoHpTmUh5F-orprn4o4OX60I7ADloSIoaPdCsGae-mWAPxlFGSNFpuZkyy6-KQ4Vfu0nK3ydVqoCr1wt3kR47XGuc6WSzsFG9qpPQuk2D8fRuZM-Ggu_LtI9_76zJYcysSkP0n9tbZaGfVzsuLE%3D)
At the time of the Benghazi attacks, **Hillary Clinton** knew that she would be running for President in 2016. She **knew that these attacks weren’t random as she suggested, and that as the secretary of State she would be held accountable**. So, like a good career out-of-touch politician, Mrs. Clinton engaged in a campaign of smoke and mirrors, **purposefully leading the American public to believe this was a random attack** , when in fact she told her daughter, Chelsea, the very same evening that the attacks took place that they were pre-meditated by an al-Qaeda ally.

**[Hillary Clinton’s deceptions and lies will forever stand to serve as prime examples of everything that is wrong in Washington.
