clean_body: For six years I hunted islamic terrorists in norther Africa who perpetrated the attacks on Benghazi. Now, I'm running for Congress Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? | Fellow Conservative, My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today. I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own. Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency . I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price. If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable , and in a moment, You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades - along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel. This political assassination made my blood boil. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me - even in the worst of times - that our freedom isn't free at all. We have to fight for it. | Depending on who you ask, the Benghazi attack was either a random attack or a pre-meditated campaign of murder. But the fact of the matter is this: An American ambassador was killed in the line of duty and politicians pointed fingers at each other over who was responsible. That BS is the reason At the time of the Benghazi attacks, Hillary Clinton knew that she would be running for President in 2016. She knew that these attacks weren’t random as she suggested, and that as the secretary of State she would be held accountable. So, like a good career out-of-touch politician, Mrs. Clinton engaged in a campaign of smoke and mirrors, purposefully leading the American public to believe this was a random attack , when in fact she told her daughter, Chelsea, the very same evening that the attacks took place that they were pre-meditated by an al-Qaeda ally. . name: Jonathan Schleifer
subject: Passing the baton
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Fairness Project
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30912421/291019064/-1553393460?refcode=em061621_jcsfarewell_espy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDgwYmI5Yi1lNGNlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rH-SBZMZGuBOpLU39ZgZaBPHat9_eZkfTmQumx1aiRA=) Dear team- I have some big news to share: after five incredible years, I am stepping down as The Fairness Project’s Executive Director and passing the baton to a teammate I’ve worked closely with for the last four years, Kelly Hall. I started at The Fairness Project in the fall of 2016, and it’s been the best work of my career. During one of the toughest periods for progressives and when America seemed most divided, our team at The Fairness Project made real progress and showed the nation what’s possible when people come together and fight for real change. Kelly has been with The Fairness Project for almost as long as I have. She’s been our Director of Policy and Partnerships for over four years, has worked closely with our campaigns, and has been integral to our successes over the past several years. She’s unwavering in her commitment to TFP’s mission and exceptional at organizing the diverse coalitions that have been critical to our campaigns. She also worked on Capitol Hill during the drafting and passage of the Affordable Care Act and in President Obama’s Administration helping to implement the law. I’ve seen Kelly in action and I know that she’s the right person to carry forward TFP’s important work and expand our impact to reach even more working families. I hope you’ll join me in welcoming Kelly to her new role. **Even though I’m leaving the TFP staff, I will always be one of its biggest supporters -- and I hope you will continue to be too. ** Together, we made history and changed nearly 18 million lives during some of the most challenging years in memory! We’ve won 20 of 21 campaigns, but winning campaigns is only meaningful for what it means in terms of impacting people’s lives. And when it comes to impact, we’ve accomplished some incredible things together:
* Put **over $19 BILLION in the pockets of working people** through minimum wage increases in nine states
* Ensured **paid leave for 5.6 MILLION people**
* Expanded **Medicaid for over 830,000 people** in red and purple states

Together, while America is deeply divided by political leaders pursuing a politics of power and self-interest, we’ve focused on impact and action. Through our people-powered campaigns, we’ve proven that Americans in red, purple, and blue states want -- and are willing to vote for -- higher wages, expanded health care coverage, paid leave, and curbing predatory lenders. Our political system may be broken, and too many politicians may ignore the needs of their constituents, but people across the country -- Democrats and Republicans, in rural areas and cities -- are willing to organize, work, and vote for progress. _I think that’s simply awesome and gives me hope for the future._ One more thing, perhaps the most important. Before I say goodbye, I hope you will join me in thanking the fantastic TFP team. I’ve worked with many great teams in my career, but their expertise and commitment to this work continually blow me away. I can’t wait to see where they take what we’ve built together and what incredible things they accomplish with your continued partnership. Thank you again for your partnership in this work. Looking forward -
Jonathan

clean_body: | = Dear team- I have some big news to share: after five incredible years, I am stepping down as The Fairness Project’s Executive Director and passing the baton to a teammate I’ve worked closely with for the last four years, Kelly Hall. I started at The Fairness Project in the fall of 2016, and it’s been the best work of my career. During one of the toughest periods for progressives and when America seemed most divided, our team at The Fairness Project made real progress and showed the nation what’s possible when people come together and fight for real change. Kelly has been with The Fairness Project for almost as long as I have. She’s been our Director of Policy and Partnerships for over four years, has worked closely with our campaigns, and has been integral to our successes over the past several years. She’s unwavering in her commitment to TFP’s mission and exceptional at organizing the diverse coalitions that have been critical to our campaigns. She also worked on Capitol Hill during the drafting and passage of the Affordable Care Act and in President Obama’s Administration helping to implement the law. I’ve seen Kelly in action and I know that she’s the right person to carry forward TFP’s important work and expand our impact to reach even more working families. I hope you’ll join me in welcoming Kelly to her new role. Even though I’m leaving the TFP staff, I will always be one of its biggest supporters -- and I hope you will continue to be too. Together, we made history and changed nearly 18 million lives during some of the most challenging years in memory! We’ve won 20 of 21 campaigns, but winning campaigns is only meaningful for what it means in terms of impacting people’s lives. And when it comes to impact, we’ve accomplished some incredible things together: Put over $19 BILLION in the pockets of working people through minimum wage increases in nine states Ensured paid leave for 5.6 MILLION people Expanded Medicaid for over 830,000 people in red and purple states Together, while America is deeply divided by political leaders pursuing a politics of power and self-interest, we’ve focused on impact and action. Through our people-powered campaigns, we’ve proven that Americans in red, purple, and blue states want -- and are willing to vote for -- higher wages, expanded health care coverage, paid leave, and curbing predatory lenders. Our political system may be broken, and too many politicians may ignore the needs of their constituents, but people across the country -- Democrats and Republicans, in rural areas and cities -- are willing to organize, work, and vote for progress. I think that’s simply awesome and gives me hope for the future. One more thing, perhaps the most important. Before I say goodbye, I hope you will join me in thanking the fantastic TFP team. I’ve worked with many great teams in my career, but their expertise and commitment to this work continually blow me away. I can’t wait to see where they take what we’ve built together and what incredible things they accomplish with your continued partnership. Thank you again for your partnership in this work. Looking forward - Jonathan | =** Paid for by The Fairness Project. Thank you for supporting The Fairness Project. Your unwavering support helps us bring economic fairness to millions of Americans and put power directly in the hands of voters through ballot initiatives. The Fairness Project has won 20 ballot initiatives since 2016, changing the lives of nearly 18 million people by raising the minimum wage, expanding access to health care, capping payday lending, and winning paid leave. And we're just getting started. If you would like more ways to keep in touch and stay involved, please consider following us on and . Your partnership allows us to make all this possible. name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Bad news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
I have some good news and some bad news for you, Peter.

**Here's the good news:** People across Wisconsin are fired up about taking down Ron Johnson, flipping this Senate seat blue, and expanding our razor-thin Democratic Senate majority -- and they're also excited about the grassroots movement we're building!

As I travel around the state, meeting folks where they're at and having important conversations, I know our message is resonating. And I'll tell you why...

Wisconsinites are tired of having a senator like Ron Johnson who puts conspiracy theories and Trumpism ahead of their best interests every single time. While he's on _Fox News_ every other night spreading misinformation, I'm putting Wisconsin families first and focusing on the kitchen table issues we all care about.

**Now, here's the bad news:** I just talked to my finance director, and we're still $1,368 short of our $10,000 mid-month goal. We only have a few hours left to close the gap, but with your help, I know we can do it. So, I'm asking:

**Will you use this personal link to add a donation before midnight?[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-june-21&refcode2=Peter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30913109/291021451/1978118503?gpsid=50_130_19422&refcode=em21_210616_MM5_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx_sl2&utm_campaign=em21_210616_MM5_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx_sl2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjk4NDkwYi1lNmNlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=INHCefw6XCjU57VP5MTJClopB_5Wjb8SL7gQJEgeCz0=)**

Our campaign isn't taking a dime from corporate PACs. In fact, the vast majority of our donations come from messages like this one. This grassroots team has always risen to the occasion, and I believe we can do it again and continue to put ourselves in a strong position to defeat Ron Johnson.

Thanks for stepping up!

clean_body: I have some good news and some bad news for you, Peter. Here's the good news: People across Wisconsin are fired up about taking down Ron Johnson, flipping this Senate seat blue, and expanding our razor-thin Democratic Senate majority -- and they're also excited about the grassroots movement we're building! As I travel around the state, meeting folks where they're at and having important conversations, I know our message is resonating. And I'll tell you why... Wisconsinites are tired of having a senator like Ron Johnson who puts conspiracy theories and Trumpism ahead of their best interests every single time. While he's on Fox News every other night spreading misinformation, I'm putting Wisconsin families first and focusing on the kitchen table issues we all care about. Now, here's the bad news: I just talked to my finance director, and we're still $1,368 short of our $10,000 mid-month goal. We only have a few hours left to close the gap, but with your help, I know we can do it. So, I'm asking: Will you use this personal link to add a donation before midnight?= Our campaign isn't taking a dime from corporate PACs. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Our best shot at preventing more obstruction from McConnell is by electing Malcolm
#

Team —
Mitch McConnell continues to play by his own set of rules.
He said if Republicans take back control of the Senate, it's "highly unlikely" he'd allow President Joe Biden to fill any potential Supreme Court vacancies in 2023 or 2024.
**The Supreme Court is on the line in Pennsylvania — and our best shot at preventing more obstruction from Mitch McConnell is by electing Malcolm Kenyatta.**
[Republicans will spend millions of dollars to try to buy this seat, but if enough of us rally behind Malcolm, we can fight back and win. Could you pitch in $3 today to flip this seat and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30913796/291023485/-347207331?refcode2=70cabe53-e8ce-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210616-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGNhYmU1My1lOGNlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tPTXKkWewZSWNvKKjyDmO7Hn6PJVf0J1yU1lnTSa3PU=)
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30913797/291023486/-347207331?refcode2=70cabe53-e8ce-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210616-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGNhYmU1My1lOGNlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tPTXKkWewZSWNvKKjyDmO7Hn6PJVf0J1yU1lnTSa3PU=)**
We know there's no way to reason with Mitch McConnell. He doesn't care about norms, rules, or precedents. He only cares about power.

So we're not exaggerating when we say that Pennsylvania's Senate race may be the only thing standing between us and more of McConnell's gridlocking.
Mitch McConnell has filled the Supreme Court with judges who put corporate interests before everyday people.
Malcolm will fight for a Court that puts our Constitution and working people first. Because we deserve a government that works for working people.
That's why we're asking you to make a $3 donation today to support our campaign.
**With lots of support from folks like you, we can elect Malcolm to fight for a government that works for working people and block Mitch McConnell's power grab.**
[If you're able, will you make that $3 donation before you close this email?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30913798/291023487/-347207331?refcode2=70cabe53-e8ce-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210616-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGNhYmU1My1lOGNlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tPTXKkWewZSWNvKKjyDmO7Hn6PJVf0J1yU1lnTSa3PU=)

subject: easy to vote, but hard to cheat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by North Carolina Republican Party ([nc
body:
The Democrats are desperate to undermine our elections.
| Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter, If we don’t have secure elections, little else matters in politics. But Democrats are actively working to undermine the integrity of our elections by banning Voter ID, legalizing ballot harvesting, and flooding their campaigns with taxpayer money. Republicans want our elections to be safe, secure, and simple. Easy to vote, but hard to cheat. clean_body: The Democrats are desperate to undermine our elections. | Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter, If we don’t have secure elections, little else matters in politics. But Democrats are actively working to undermine the integrity of our elections by banning Voter ID, legalizing ballot harvesting, and flooding their campaigns with taxpayer money. Republicans want our elections to be safe, secure, and simple. Easy to vote, but hard to cheat. And we’re never going to give up. | | The Left and their propaganda puppets in the media want you to think that requiring an ID to vote is “racist.” That’s a lie. It’s just common sense. It ought to be easy to vote in America, but impossible to cheat. That’s the only way we can be sure that our elections are fair, accurate, and secure. | Thank you. Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

| | Derek,

The extreme Republican candidate running against Terry is Glenn Youngkin. Youngkin is a mega-millionaire who has Donald Trump’s “full endorsement.”

It ain’t a mystery why Trump is all geeked up about Youngkin. Election experts are saying Democrats could lose Virginia. If that happens, Republicans would get a huge surge of momentum going into the 2022 midterms.

So it’s this simple:

If Glenn Youngkin wins, Donald Trump wins. Worse, Trumpism will be on the march again heading into a pivotal midterm for the future of our democracy.

The good news is that Terry McAuliffe has what it takes to win. He’s tough, experienced, and has bold plans for Virginia that every single Democrat should be over the moon to support.

Terry can win, but he’s going to need to build a historic grassroots team to pull it off. Youngkin has pledged spending up to $75 million of his own money to buy the Governor’s office for him and Trump.

So here’s my ask:

Let’s work our hearts out to make sure Terry McAuliffe wins the 2021 Virginia governor’s race. If we do that we put a stake in the heart of Trumpism once and for all.

**[Will you donate to make sure Terry McAuliffe wins in Virginia? A Glenn Youngkin victory would be a disaster for the future of our country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30914515/291025813/-2023814932?refcode=20210616.2_JC_6JCA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDExYWNkNy1lYWNlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4LB3rTxA9hEIXAWRL_jTqApWSMx3u-JKBhDbI5sZVp0=)**

James Carville | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30914516/291025814/-2023814932?refcode=20210616.2_JC_6JCA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDExYWNkNy1lYWNlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4LB3rTxA9hEIXAWRL_jTqApWSMx3u-JKBhDbI5sZVp0=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Matt=20Royer?=
subject: about last tuesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by KTBBH PAC
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b4f5c9924976/about-last-tuesday?e=76fc145c69)
---
| | [ ](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=159bddcea8&e=76fc145c69)
---
| |
---
| Hey Derek-
---
| I don’t know if you all saw this but Progressives got beaten up pretty badly on Tuesday here in Virginia. Am I upset by that? Of course I am, I personally put a lot of heart and soul into the campaign for the candidate I was working for. Am I confused by it? Not even the slightest.

Virginia politics is a cruel and unrelenting mistress. And we all paid the price for it. But you know what? I would rather lose us 1000 times while holding onto our morals and values and fighting for what I believe in than to sell out once and win.

[But we need a united Progressive movement to push forward.](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=1b11d91cab&e=76fc145c69)

We worked day in and day out. For candidates up and down the ballot. We got some wins. However, I think the losses outweigh what we have gained. What we ended up with statewide was the same old situation as we have had for decades. And why is that?

Lack of Education on the Issues.

We can continue to yell at ourselves internally in our silos until we are blue in the face but we cannot rely on a few small spurts of energy every other year and expect things to go the way we want it to. We just can’t.

[What we have to do, what we must do, is organize our communities around these issues.](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=822f31ad56&e=76fc145c69) It is not enough to just put up candidates and hope for the best in odd years. We have to be out there and be loud about it. We cannot assume. Assuming that people see what we see as a problem doesn’t work. That’s what we saw yesterday. We ran in our own lanes trying to get stuff done. We split votes. We fired at ourselves and for what? The old guard thrives on a divided Progressive movement. It’s how they continue to reign. But what does that also mean? Listening to one another. Teamwork together. Not being a hero. No one man is an island and that is true for everyone. No one is exempted from that. We cannot continue to say that only one of us will be the one to save the movement. But we must unite to make sure that we elect Progressives while holding those in office accountable

[Let's coalesce and come together. The people united will never be defeated. ](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=3632cbedc7&e=76fc145c69) Keep up the good work. Don’t agonize, organize.
---
|

Matt Royer

---
| | | | | | | [](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=8ae46b826c&e=76fc145c69)
---
| | [](https://gmail.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=c59f18f009&e=76fc145c69)
---

body:
The midterm elections may feel far away, but our race is already heating up. Our first Republican opponent has filed his paperwork to run against Kim. This comes after the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) named Kim's seat a top target to flip in 2022. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30915264/291028762/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjQ0MDQzNy1lZWNlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TOlSVKcO2Lxrq1XVUTkUobbxUrDxFd1NPdKLzsbKm-w=&emci=5d33ec74-adce-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=9b440437-eece-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15820338)

Peter,

The midterm elections may feel far away, but our race is already heating up. Our first Republican opponent has filed his paperwork to run against Kim. This comes after the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) named Kim's seat a top target to flip in 2022.

National Republicans and our opponent are gearing up to do whatever it takes to defeat Kim and retake the House majority. We have a tough fight ahead of us, so we need to get to work right away if we're going to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority.

**[Will you rush a donation before our mid-month deadline at midnight to help ensure we have the resources to build another winning campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30915266/291028764/347193299?gpsid=8_30_19203&refcode=em21_210616_mm2_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210616_mm2_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjQ0MDQzNy1lZWNlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TOlSVKcO2Lxrq1XVUTkUobbxUrDxFd1NPdKLzsbKm-w=)**

There's too much at stake for us to lose this race. In a recent interview, our opponent refused to accept the results of the 2020 election. He's going along with Donald Trump's attacks on our democracy and it's clear he's ready to roll back the progress Kim and her Democratic colleagues are making.

We need to ensure we have the resources to take on whatever our opponent and national Republicans throw our way. But Kim doesn't accept a dime of corporate PAC money, so she's counting on grassroots supporters like you to help her prepare for the tough fights ahead.

**[Chip in before our mid-month fundraising deadline to help protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30915267/291028766/347193299?gpsid=8_30_19203&refcode=em21_210616_mm2_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210616_mm2_fnd_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjQ0MDQzNy1lZWNlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TOlSVKcO2Lxrq1XVUTkUobbxUrDxFd1NPdKLzsbKm-w=)**

Peter, The midterm elections may feel far away, but our race is already heating up. Our first Republican opponent has filed his paperwork to run against Kim. This comes after the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) named Kim's seat a top target to flip in 2022. National Republicans and our opponent are gearing up to do whatever it takes to defeat Kim and retake the House majority. We have a tough fight ahead of us, so we need to get to work right away if we're going to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority. = There's too much at stake for us to lose this race. In a recent interview, our opponent refused to accept the results of the 2020 election. He's going along with Donald Trump's attacks on our democracy and it's clear he's ready to roll back the progress Kim and her Democratic colleagues are making. We need to ensure we have the resources to take on whatever our opponent and national Republicans throw our way. But Kim doesn't accept a dime of corporate PAC money, so she's counting on grassroots supporters like you to help her prepare for the tough fights ahead. = Thanks, Team Schrier National Republicans have named Rep. name: Team Moulton
subject: 🚨 What McConnell just said 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30915601/291029508/2005830277?refcode=20210616_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjM2YjE3Ny1lZWNlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ucC2oW_QjEWWLrIgbiC3Qn8sUoUXlwDinUdXv-Nxe1E=) Friend, Over the weekend, Mitch McConnell bragged on far-right radio about blocking President Obama from appointing Merrick Garland to the Supreme Court. He said it was the most consequential thing he’s done in the Senate and that he would do it again if he takes back his position as Majority Leader. McConnell said he would do whatever it takes to prevent President Biden from filling any seat on the Supreme Court given the chance—even if that meant leaving the seat open for years. Mitch McConnell is as partisan as it gets. He doesn’t care about precedent or what’s best for the country—he wants to notch wins for the far-right. In 2016, he blocked President Obama from filling a Supreme Court vacancy by falsely claiming he could not appoint a new justice during an election year. In 2020, he helped Donald Trump rush Amy Coney Barrett into a lifetime appointment just a few weeks before Americans went to the polls. It would be a disaster if Mitch McConnell became the Majority Leader after the 2022 midterms, friend. So we need to do everything we can to preserve our Democratic majorities in the House and Senate. [**Will you add your name right now to commit to working to stop Mitch McConnell from regaining control of the Senate in 2022?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30915602/291029509/1334116450?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjM2YjE3Ny1lZWNlLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ucC2oW_QjEWWLrIgbiC3Qn8sUoUXlwDinUdXv-Nxe1E=&emci=11a99e62-ecce-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=af36b177-eece-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=194769) McConnell helped push through the absolute worst of Trump’s agenda, and now, even after losing much of his power in the last election, he is hellbent on obstructing President Biden’s legislative agenda. Let’s do everything we can to stop him from becoming the Majority Leader again. Thanks, —Team Moulton clean_body: | | | = Friend, Over the weekend, Mitch McConnell bragged on far-right radio about blocking President Obama from appointing Merrick Garland to the Supreme Court. He said it was the most consequential thing he’s done in the Senate and that he would do it again if he takes back his position as Majority Leader. McConnell said he would do whatever it takes to prevent President Biden from filling any seat on the Supreme Court given the chance—even if that meant leaving the seat open for years. Mitch McConnell is as partisan as it gets. He doesn’t care about precedent or what’s best for the country—he wants to notch wins for the far-right. In 2016, he blocked President Obama from filling a Supreme Court vacancy by falsely claiming he could not appoint a new justice during an election year. In 2020, he helped Donald Trump rush Amy Coney Barrett into a lifetime appointment just a few weeks before Americans went to the polls. It would be a disaster if Mitch McConnell became the Majority Leader after the 2022 midterms, friend. So we need to do everything we can to preserve our Democratic majorities in the House and Senate. McConnell helped push through the absolute worst of Trump’s agenda, and now, even after losing much of his power in the last election, he is hellbent on obstructing President Biden’s legislative agenda. Let’s do everything we can to stop him from becoming the Majority Leader again. subject: HUPFER: Bad-Faith Democrat Attacks on Election Integrity Are Failing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc
body:
This week Chairman Kyle Hupfer wrote an op-ed for RealClearPolitics.com about Democrat attempts to weaken the security and integrity of our elections.

http://www.indgop.org?mc_cid=a5c6ce3a00&mc_eid=UNIQID

This week Chairman Kyle Hupfer wrote an op-ed for RealClearPolitics.com about Democrat attempts to weaken the security and integrity of our elections. The text of the op-ed is below and you can use this link to tweet and share it:

https://www.realclearpolitics.com/articles/2021/06/15/bad-faith_democrat_attacks_on_election_integrity_are_failing_145933.html?mc_cid=a5c6ce3a00&mc_eid=UNIQID.

** Bad-Faith Democrat Attacks on Election Integrity Are Failing
------------------------------------------------------------

COMMENTARY

By Kyle Hupfer
June 15, 2021

A recent legal proceeding in Florida proves the cheap, theatrical partisanship driving nationwide Democrat attacks on election integrity. Priorities USA, a Democrat super PAC, sued the state of Florida, claiming it made voting-by-mail too difficult. One of the plaintiffs, a Yale graduate student, was asked in a deposition to explain why returning his ballot was difficult. He explained it was a 30-minute walk to his nearest post office. He was then asked if he knew of Google and if he had used it to look for a closer mailbox. He stated that he had not used Google or done any other research to find closer mailboxes. The student was unaware of the USPS mailbox six blocks away from his apartment or that he could use the mailbox at his apartment complex. This disastrous deposition could have been the reason the Democrats gave up on the case, walking away before the trial even began.

Such a comprehensive failure in a single instance would be embarrassing enough. However, this kind of floundering isn't an isolated event for those Democrats engaged in dishonest attacks on election integrity. Failure is a pattern.

The COVID-19 pandemic breathed new life into the Democrat voting offensive that before the crisis seemed out of ideas. Their showcase voting “rights” litigation pre-pandemic was an unsuccessful and petty attack on state rules for the order in which candidates appear on the ballot (https://nam11.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.washingtonpost.com%2Fopinions%2Fdemocracy-itself-is-literally-on-the-ballot%2F2020%2F01%2F03%2Fc38bbfe2-2da9-11ea-bcd4-24597950008f_story.html&data=04%7C01%7CEVaughn%40gop.com%7C1770ef35f537499168d308d92c2ab1ba%7C4a082c81950a410d9618462a9c74d6ae%7C1%7C0%7C637589384151133352%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJWIjoiMC4wLjAwMDAiLCJQIjoiV2luMzIiLCJBTiI6Ik1haWwiLCJXVCI6Mn0%3D%7C1000&sdata=xasRIXUgcFwWCtf%2FrPzewKJyjmyhfJ7D4kathPk6iXY%3D&reserved=0&mc_cid=a5c6ce3a00&mc_eid=UNIQID) . Bad actors on the left leveraged the pandemic in order to attack established voting processes. The cynicism in these theatrics is matched only by their ineffectiveness: Despite using COVID as a pretense to
launch a nationwide attack on our election laws, Republican-led litigation efforts largely blunted their assault. Democrats struck out completely in Arizona, Florida, Iowa, Maine, Michigan, New Hampshire, Ohio, South Carolina, and Wisconsin. Judges of all stripes rightfully saw through the cynical and speculative nature of the Democrats’ claims. Republican National Committee attorneys have also actively intervened to thwart settlements and defend state laws on those rare occasions when states refused to do so. The RNC remains committed to protecting election integrity nationwide, especially when Democrats attack the security of your ballot.

Democrats are simply unable to prove that election integrity laws make voting harder. Consider their challenge to Arizona’s ballot harvesting ban, where the Democratic National Committee was unable to show that the ban stopped even a single person from voting. While Arizona’s law is currently under consideration by the Supreme Court, almost every court has seen through the charade and upheld similar bans. A recent Democrat challenge to Michigan’s absentee application harvesting ban failed miserably, with the court noting the “plaintiffs ha[d] not come forward with evidence that any voters” had been impacted by the ban.

The same goes for the Democrats’ challenges to voter ID laws, as demonstrated by their lawsuit against Virginia’s photo ID requirement (which the Democrats there have since regrettably repealed). There, the court found that “none of the voter witnesses” provided by the Democrats “was actually denied his or her right to vote.”The trend is clear: Democrat lawsuits are all "style" and no substance. Their theatrics wilt under scrutiny because they have no substantive reason for attacking election integrity other than cheap political gain.

With their track record of failure, the only conclusion is that their efforts are merely for show and their “claims” are lies. These unsuccessful lawsuits have real world consequences. First, the mainstream media amplifies Democrat lies, misleading the public even though most Americans support stronger election integrity measures that protect the security of their ballots. Second, even nonpartisan election lawyers have complained that Democrats' litigious theatrics are counterproductive and risk evisceration (https://nam11.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frickhasen%2Fstatus%2F1392988443311964164&data=04%7C01%7CEVaughn%40gop.com%7C1770ef35f537499168d308d92c2ab1ba%7C4a082c81950a410d9618462a9c74d6ae%7C1%7C0%7C637589384151143284%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJWIjoiMC4wLjAwMDAiLCJQIjoiV2luMzIiLCJBTiI6Ik1haWwiLCJXVCI6Mn0%3D%7C1000&sdata=34I%2F47OGQOgAW0ZijEubPqMBatEs648uJ6TbHzn6a3s%3D&reserved=0&mc_cid=a5c6ce3a00&mc_eid=UNIQID) of voting rights laws. While Republicans may frequently disagree
with these lawyers on voting issues, it’s a legitimate point. They fear, like the boy who cried wolf, that Democrat scaremongering may lead courts to overlook legitimate voting rights claims. Fortunately, citizens and courts alike can see through the Democrat charade, rendering their attacks on our democratic system a master class in failure.

============================================================

| Joe Biden spent this week meeting with world leaders... **humiliating himself and our country with his incompetence and weakness.** Lowlights from his trip include:

* **ADMITTING** he would get "in trouble" by his handlers for answering questions.

I worked in the State Department under President Trump as Senior White House Advisor - and I'm embarrassed by what I saw Joe Biden do last week. name: Harold Earls
subject: Our kids deserve better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Earls for Georgia |
body:
I have a message for Nancy Pelosi and her liberal goons for making such a huge mess of our country. | |
---
[](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=9b0f63f1d4a84f1d8787f92f02faf83b&_e=0BppK0pFHp1nT86gTWYNx9Ls50YxBSK6X7JPDB35oc9rG2HorHXGF4t8s3U-YBGQWgmTpXJV7C9mPH0gI96t4c2atqhh6NDuX9pPebXqrqEdDbO522pAmuNcK-906DIOPGi6EugDC8jUlD6fFEEGbIowIMOoJwQMIZkzWs4xsqkmDee06pvxQlH05Wik5og-lybKZdalmN_M9tO_l1WFN2FmBy8ykhgnMviEtJwWg7QXmuw35dZKu4kvxHw_37bVlx6dKKJapSppmlZyejoh3mQBs4FJSNSCJ5SoQwaEjIfreI7UMUMRsd7jzGWl6i13bf-3F8eWk86qVGxCVmh1SjaKHRVVbGcwXpatH75Ub9hbXyC1w4H7AkpYwzbcfDlhpOzdgg_FLoPqnB9n-ziTBvWpE9Yn0HTYeS7AXKWYQcKRHwcrP5Jy13jyFb6K-NiCx7AlGnypELL4-bD65cd64XsHfxy7eFV6ltRA2BH8w27NslM1q020pcDEXisw6nj7)
|
---
Peter,

I was watching my boys play yesterday and I got to thinking about the world they are growing up in.

_Violent riots in our communities, a crisis at our southern border, inflation pushing our economy to the brink of collapse, cancel culture silencing free speech, and communist propaganda being taught in our schools..._

This is the America Nancy Pelosi and her liberal goons in Washington have created.

Thinking about that made my blood boil. So I made a video to send to ole Nancy about it. Check it out:
|
---
[](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=9b0f63f1d4a84f1d8787f92f02faf83b&_e=0BppK0pFHp1nT86gTWYNx9Ls50YxBSK6X7JPDB35oc9rG2HorHXGF4t8s3U-YBGQWgmTpXJV7C9mPH0gI96t4c2atqhh6NDuX9pPebXqrqEdDbO522pAmuNcK-906DIOPGi6EugDC8jUlD6fFEEGbIowIMOoJwQMIZkzWs4xsqkmDee06pvxQlH05Wik5og-lybKZdalmN_M9tO_l1WFN2FmBy8ykhgnMviEtJwWg7QXmuw35dZKu4kvxHw_37bVlx6dKKJapSppmlZyejoh3huGgjecVanAraLthfPXI8DA2SDxB-VTb6cARC_1mFGFmpKhvmvPz2E0q6iGb52xJYekaLZZkYiUjQKuzt_03A0uNInm7hzrs86nDX0jspN2tugIxQWiccdkwgKBoycovPjG7OipdFwn3uGrYW4M2w-8QJltiPVdq0CP1TiPFfs5uayuytYEkWAtAZ4xRKGj9EdKfMgKp6xLNwcC5qNgq_diWPOEhvov4B3de-UQYEAp)
|
---
[**WATCH THE VIDEO**](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=9b0f63f1d4a84f1d8787f92f02faf83b&_e=0BppK0pFHp1nT86gTWYNx9Ls50YxBSK6X7JPDB35oc9rG2HorHXGF4t8s3U-YBGQWgmTpXJV7C9mPH0gI96t4c2atqhh6NDuX9pPebXqrqEdDbO522pAmuNcK-906DIOPGi6EugDC8jUlD6fFEEGbIowIMOoJwQMIZkzWs4xsqkmDee06pvxQlH05Wik5og-lybKZdalmN_M9tO_l1WFN2FmBy8ykhgnMviEtJwWg7QXmuw35dZKu4kvxHw_37bVlx6dKKJapSppmlZyejoh3pGuVLS22hcYYT2CH0MCkiHKApduputF2jKL1zCYSvl0_x67zfSTmLd5LC1zcupdvejkCulAHGWK5BB9Z0gRV2QDaUdUErzRqgFcdoSGvBAW_p70eCIdznTy7Pe1IkvPljXN9I-VvvvS9Qzjc9hNHE_liaWH1BcuzJT-GeqgGLUnA3K3iXjUQ9JmB5q8aSVdwtttOTF0182JJSTgG1FWkXc21oOk2Mexlr5aT6qEc2oJ)
|
---
As a parent, I want my boys to have a safe and prosperous future. The biggest thing I can do to ensure they have one is heading to Washington and fighting back against the Left’s radical agenda.

**If you want a brighter future for your kids, will you chip in to my campaign and stand with me in this fight, Peter?**

\- When Democrats Turn Out

name: Caitlyn for California
subject: URGENT: We can’t ignore the border crisis.
body:

name: Erica Smith
subject: A moral imperative
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
This is a long email, but it’s important.
#
Last weekend, I stopped by the Rivers Correctional Facility, a recently closed private prison in North Carolina. **To put it plainly, it felt like visiting a plantation.**
[****](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/em_ms_ES_20210601_EA_privateprisons/?source=em20210616-182&t=1&akid=182%2E3698%2EU5mTl-)
Across the country, facilities like this one make their profits by locking up poor folks, particularly Black and Brown folks — _and then mistreat, use, and abuse them once they’re there._
**Private prisons are utterly and entirely immoral — but nearly 4,000 corporations make money off private prisons in America today.[Will you add your name to join our call to abolish private prisons nationwide?](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/em_ms_ES_20210601_EA_privateprisons/?source=em20210616-182&t=2&akid=182%2E3698%2EU5mTl-)**
**[Abolish Private Prisons »](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/em_ms_ES_20210601_EA_privateprisons/?source=em20210616-182&t=3&akid=182%2E3698%2EU5mTl-)**
Our unjust carceral system is designed to punish the poor and Black and Brown people. To take away our votes and our hope, to decimate our communities, and keep economic and political power concentrated in the hands of the few, not the many.
**It is a moral imperative that we end the private for-profit system in America. Our justice system needs to center safety and rehabilitation, not profits and corporations.**
[**In the U.S. Senate, I will fight to center people over profits. I will end the days where Washington hands over billions of dollars to corporations to profit off inhumane treatment and detention. If you’re with me, add your name to show your support.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/em_ms_ES_20210601_EA_privateprisons/?source=em20210616-182&t=4&akid=182%2E3698%2EU5mTl-)
**[Abolish Private Prisons »](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/em_ms_ES_20210601_EA_privateprisons/?source=em20210616-182&t=5&akid=182%2E3698%2EU5mTl-)**
In solidarity,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210616-182-footer&t=6&refcode2=182_3698_U5mTl-&akid=182%2E3698%2EU5mTl-)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=7&akid=182%2E3698%2EU5mTl-)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=182%2E3698%2EU5mTl-)

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: High-speed rail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
It will take a mass outcry across the country to win funding for high-speed rail.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210616-2219-header&t=1&akid=2219%2E2526796%2E_OSv88)
Congress is in the midst of negotiating a massive infrastructure package, and the question is: _What are we going to invest in to create a better future?_
We know that building a high-speed rail system would create millions of union jobs and boost regional economies, connect communities historically left behind, and help decarbonize our transportation sector. But right now, Biden’s current plan puts over $100 billion dollars _more_ into car infrastructure than rail and transit combined.
**So Alexandria joined Rep. Seth Moulton, the US High Speed Rail Association, and the International Brotherhood of Teamsters today to call for an increase in high-speed rail funding in the upcoming infrastructure package.**
It will take a mass outcry across the country to pass increased funding for high-speed rail. That’s where you come in.
[Will you please contact your representatives right now and urge them to support increased high-speed rail funding in our upcoming infrastructure package? It’ll take less than five minutes — and we’ve provided a sample script for you. ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/9127?source=em20210616-2219-P&t=2&akid=2219%2E2526796%2E_OSv88)
**[Call now](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/9127?source=em20210616-2219-P&t=3&akid=2219%2E2526796%2E_OSv88)**
The federal government spends at least _three times_ as much on roads than transit and rail combined each year — despite the fact that high-speed rail creates more jobs per billion dollars invested.
And unlike highway construction, which has historically displaced entire neighborhoods – most often communities of color – high-speed rail actually connects communities, cuts traffic, makes downtowns more walkable, and creates new housing and economic opportunities.
Lastly, a high-speed rail network will help decarbonize our transportation sector by shifting millions of trips into an electrically-powered mode of transport while reducing demand for options that rely on fossil fuels.
Climate legislation is infrastructure legislation – that’s why we must seize this opportunity and pass an infrastructure package that actually helps us meet our climate goals.
[Your members of Congress need to know that high-speed rail is important to you. Please call your representatives today and urge them to pass a federal infrastructure bill that increases funding for high-speed rail. ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/9127?source=em20210616-2219-P&t=4&akid=2219%2E2526796%2E_OSv88)
Thank you for speaking out.
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210616?refcode=em20210616-2219-P&t=5&refcode2=2219_2526796__OSv88&akid=2219%2E2526796%2E_OSv88)**
---

name: Derek Marshall for Congress
subject: Two weeks to go—
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
I’ve got a deadline, Peter, but with your help, I can exceed expectations!

Hi Peter,
**It’s Derek. I’m writing to you today from Victorville, CA, where we’re under yet another excessive heat warning—as I write this, it’s 108 degrees and we’re getting into the late afternoon. It’s been a dry winter, the mountain snowmelt is low, the brush is incredibly dry, and now we’re looking at a potentially terrifying summer of wildfires. **
[**Peter, we need climate action now. Can you chip in $27 to send a climate champion to Congress today? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30920949/291062987/-1874959920?refcode=EM-DM-EOQ2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTJlN2M5Mi0wOGNmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QJaxoRNBIjxks1ov_yJqvIBoWqu8aacR7HXkG5oVgpo=)

Meanwhile, my friend Megan lives halfway across the country in Louisiana, where she’s getting ready for a tropical storm which has formed in the Gulf of Mexico and hearing scientists say that 2021 is predicted to be one of the most active hurricane seasons on record, which is particularly hard, since last year’s hurricane season was also brutal. Megan and her family are far from CA-08, but the climate crisis is hitting all over, sometimes in different ways, and we’re running out of time.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30920951/291062993/-1874959920?refcode=EM-DM-EOQ2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTJlN2M5Mi0wOGNmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QJaxoRNBIjxks1ov_yJqvIBoWqu8aacR7HXkG5oVgpo=)**
This isn’t right.
It isn’t normal.
**We cannot afford to wait any longer for urgent, bold action. We need climate champions in power now, not denialists, not people who think that moving away from fossil fuels by 2070 is adequate urgency, and not people who are willing to let oil companies lead the way. **
**[Can you chip in $27 today, or whatever you can, to help me get to Congress and fight like hell against climate change, before it’s too late? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30920952/291062994/-1874959920?refcode=EM-DM-EOQ2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTJlN2M5Mi0wOGNmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QJaxoRNBIjxks1ov_yJqvIBoWqu8aacR7HXkG5oVgpo=)**

clean_body: I’ve got a deadline, Peter, but with your help, I can exceed expectations! Hi Peter, It’s Derek. I’m writing to you today from Victorville, CA, where we’re under yet another excessive heat warning—as I write this, it’s 108 degrees and we’re getting into the late afternoon. It’s been a dry winter, the mountain snowmelt is low, the brush is incredibly dry, and now we’re looking at a potentially terrifying summer of wildfires. = = Meanwhile, my friend Megan lives halfway across the country in Louisiana, where she’s getting ready for a tropical storm which has formed in the Gulf of Mexico and hearing scientists say that 2021 is predicted to be one of the most active hurricane seasons on record, which is particularly hard, since last year’s hurricane season was also brutal. Megan and her family are far from CA-08, but the climate crisis is hitting all over, sometimes in different ways, and we’re running out of time. = This isn’t right. It isn’t normal. We cannot afford to wait any longer for urgent, bold action. We need climate champions in power now, not denialists, not people who think that moving away from fossil fuels by 2070 is adequate urgency, and not people who are willing to let oil companies lead the way. = In Solidarity, Derek Marshall Candidate for Congress, CA-08 = Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress. name: Patrick Morrisey
subject: Huge Victory Against the Biden Administration!
body:
| | | | This is our first major legal victory against against the Biden Administration.
---
---
Dear Peter,
Yesterday, a federal judge in Louisiana granted a nationwide, preliminary injunction against enforcement of President Biden’s executive order on oil and gas leases on public lands. I’m part of this multi-state state coalition challenging the Biden executive order in federal court.
_**This is our first major legal victory against the Biden Administration**_ _._ Here is our statement:
“For our country’s sake, we must prevail over the Biden Administration’s radical, anti-fossil fuel, China First energy policies. From protecting energy jobs, to defending our gun rights, to blocking the flood of fentanyl flooding into our state, we will use every tool to keep the federal government in check and on task, beating back destructive policies and forcing the federal government to do its statutory and constitutional duty to protect this country.”
Please stay on the lookout for more victories in the near future. We will continue to fight against Biden and Pelosi's radical policies with everything that we got.
[If you would be willing, please make a small contribution today to Team Morrisey to show your support for our first MAJOR legal victory against the Biden Administration.](http://url8766.teammorrisey.com/ls/click?upn=1Tdwy4hnuy5QvBqgHcrNA5vUG4XtYCytxd-2FFkvwO8mgL73IQWR7SBLnFsngROzMeMVl8GOapa9FRND3sl30hNeO11xkTveHDzP6Dm-2B-2BMtTA-3DIuPB_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6L8M-2BYXJzWPIb8G9C-2BNOcqKPpR1qb-2F-2BQNex0O6-2BIbzBt5MpESi8ZdIPwVGmm8SFlSoTVYegWdGRNoYTiVgErN7MZY7bQSOdbIgh4haWXn-2FH-2BQurECAOS2RlCuR34V6-2B1rIBGNx1j-2F2Gb2cw0hAnE8vl4u0rF-2BjjL5uV7JHwIxQGiLyGK0AWAwvPGOT2FJu744oyYb1POYebgYMnzqKhhPeuKDgDkSAQYpGBQKY8zd1LkrTfjfaMvS2oyTDsEF4zV89c3skzfEYFCNoDN30MOBenlIGoOTubDVlh0KlIljO35jR5iOL2q-2B18K94TWef2ihm18m0CBSjQmh-2Fe7FYHTJEiPm9Fl7l5r9V01mhHD5F7ZcAvljIOvEshJ7z28avy5wjE5P4ldlLJ6vTtpd3V2G1oXUDhdFgGWWVu5BN70iWs6G3V0C1d-2FgUw003Z30LYg-2BmhvGqLqGKugzl0FmKRWepsSAOR-2BSbVJIgsLx-2B3nxbNOndqwV-2FLo9MoIaPKEBMSx1h-2BNwKu-2BI5oi9pe5pZbqZr2f0uWnb5LfLp7kwkGfL9tOwXuzFaNCzfRy7YCu6pGSF4s9kDq36XKDyTq69kwc-2FLvgLSuyK-2BFT0ByaLKJzjN2ZB-2FTe7ChCsG3zuxjiQSckjFTgPiGGKcd-2BVFDvCpfxyGD2L-2FyI41NL3PY5fGhFqTwi7czHwHZp3lU07TTqbLFrifWrbJDcl2GOIqZ0TEqPg3vbQqFBJ-2FrAdhgiJkPQB2JyJg-2B8XO8XQD6LfyNM6zaol2bFO0-2BicMUtAqYIX5QAo-2Fx8BEMm-2FoiFpSL-2BrSOsERELCOvbAq0kj0fC6r112j-2FHfuR6QwPepHuw9hHBKOHsbFw-3D-3D)

clean_body: | | | | This is our first major legal victory against against the Biden Administration. Dear Peter, Yesterday, a federal judge in Louisiana granted a nationwide, preliminary injunction against enforcement of President Biden’s executive order on oil and gas leases on public lands. I’m part of this multi-state state coalition challenging the Biden executive order in federal court. This is our first major legal victory against the Biden Administration . Here is our statement: “For our country’s sake, we must prevail over the Biden Administration’s radical, anti-fossil fuel, China First energy policies. From protecting energy jobs, to defending our gun rights, to blocking the flood of fentanyl flooding into our state, we will use every tool to keep the federal government in check and on task, beating back destructive policies and forcing the federal government to do its statutory and constitutional duty to protect this country.” Please stay on the lookout for more victories in the near future. We will continue to fight against Biden and Pelosi's radical policies with everything that we got. Thank you. Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey West Virginia Attorney General | Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Morrisey 2020, Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. body:
I applaud the House for voting tonight to make Juneteenth, a celebration of the final emancipation of enslaved Africans in Galveston, Texas, a national holiday. After passing the Senate earlier this week, it is now heading to Joe Biden's desk. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30921551/291067478/902632477?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWE0NmQyNS0wY2NmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p5rIlpZDZ3KNO7OBJwJ95Iwqdy_ze4kRRvtBXfsOTPA=&emci=992f6635-ffce-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=01a46d25-0ccf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15053672) | I applaud the House for voting tonight to make Juneteenth, a celebration of the final emancipation of enslaved Africans in Galveston, Texas, a national holiday. After passing the Senate earlier this week, it is now heading to Joe Biden's desk. This is yet again an instance in which Pennsylvania is leading the nation. Just last week, I introduced a memorandum to the Pennsylvania Senate to make Juneteenth a national holiday in Pennsylvania. [_**If you agree that Juneteenth ought to be made a national holiday, add your name to our petition urging Joe Biden to pass this bill.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30921552/291067479/-123024879?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWE0NmQyNS0wY2NmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p5rIlpZDZ3KNO7OBJwJ95Iwqdy_ze4kRRvtBXfsOTPA=&emci=992f6635-ffce-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=01a46d25-0ccf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15053672) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30921553/291067480/-123024879?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWE0NmQyNS0wY2NmLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p5rIlpZDZ3KNO7OBJwJ95Iwqdy_ze4kRRvtBXfsOTPA=&emci=992f6635-ffce-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=01a46d25-0ccf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15053672) However, we still have a long way to go. Now that Congress has passed this bill, it's time to take real action to improve the material lives of Black and brown Americans across the country. **Congress can do that by passing the Emmitt Till Anti-Lynching Act, passing the John Lewis Voting Rights Act, and reforming the policing and criminal justice systems in America.** I am proud to see that the legislation I've championed here in Pennsylvania once again sets the tone for the nation, and I'm proud that Juneteenth will get the recognition it deserves on the federal level. Now, **I challenge Congress to take the next step and follow the lead of bills I've championed here in Pennsylvania, like legalizing cannabis and expunging the records of those with cannabis-related convictions**. Today is a day to celebrate. Tomorrow, we must get back to work to make a more just nation, and I promise to you that I will always lead that push however I can. Thank you so much, \-- Sharif
---

| STOP THE MASK MANDATE. STOP GOVERNOR CUOMO.
Friend,
We need to stop Governor Cuomo!
Despite the taxpayer funded fireworks announcing the end of the pandemic, Governor Cuomo still maintains his grip over New York State government.
Last week, the Democrats wrapped up legislative session without repealing Governor Cuomo's emergency powers - voting against our Republican efforts to repeal these powers more than 40 times.
That's right, under one-party rule, one man is still in charge of everything here in New York.
What does that mean?
It means ridiculous policies the mask mandates for school children remain in effect. Despite the summer heat and increases in vaccinations, Governor Cuomo is still forcing our youngest New Yorkers to "mask up!"
This needs to stop.

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Federal Prison Inmates Escape Undetected, Deceive Guards with Dummies in Bed
body:
The nation’s federal prison system is in hot water again, this time for security failures that allow inmates to escape undetected.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | June 16, 2021
---|---|---
| | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55948&L=25145&F=H&)
---
# [Federal Prison Inmates Escape Undetected, Deceive Guards with Dummies in Bed](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55948&L=25145&F=H&)
The nation’s federal prison system is in hot water again, this time for security failures that allow inmates to escape undetected. In some cases, the prisoners who slip away place dummies in their bed to deceive correctional officers and in other instances they simply have other inmates pose as them during counts. Details of the breaches are offered in a Management Advisory Memorandum issued this month by the Department of Justice (DOJ) Inspector General (IG). The document focuses on the Federal Bureau of Prisons (FOB) minimum security facilities, known as Federal Prison Camp (FPC) and Satellite Prison Camp (SPC) locations. The watchdog’s findings should embarrass FOB officials at every level. “Gaps in security at FPCs and SPCs present risks that inmates will escape and, if they return, smuggle contraband back into facilities undetected, which endangers the community, other BOP inmates, and correctional staff,” the IG writes in its memo to prison officials.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55948&L=25145&F=H&)
|

clean_body: The nation’s federal prison system is in hot water again, this time for security failures that allow inmates to escape undetected. | | | Because no one is above the law! | June 16, 2021 ---|---|--- | | == == The nation’s federal prison system is in hot water again, this time for security failures that allow inmates to escape undetected. In some cases, the prisoners who slip away place dummies in their bed to deceive correctional officers and in other instances they simply have other inmates pose as them during counts. Details of the breaches are offered in a Management Advisory Memorandum issued this month by the Department of Justice (DOJ) Inspector General (IG). The document focuses on the Federal Bureau of Prisons (FOB) minimum security facilities, known as Federal Prison Camp (FPC) and Satellite Prison Camp (SPC) locations. The watchdog’s findings should embarrass FOB officials at every level. “Gaps in security at FPCs and SPCs present risks that inmates will escape and, if they return, smuggle contraband back into facilities undetected, which endangers the community, other BOP inmates, and correctional staff,” the IG writes in its memo to prison officials. == | | | = Fox News Schiff’s tantrum was triggered by the recent disclosure that the Trump Department of Justice obtained his phone records, along with another California Democrat, Eric Swalwell and several journalists. Their data was seized pursuant to grand jury subpoenas served on Apple in 2017 and 2018 when Schiff was the ranking Democrat on the House Intelligence Committee and Swalwell was his lackey-in-chief. = The Daily Signal Chris Farrell, director of investigations and research at Judicial Watch, explained to me in an interview how the cartels’ control of the Mexican border is driven by profit and dehumanizes the people they traffic. Farrell, a former Army counterintelligence officer, has over 18 years of experience investigating the U.S.-Mexican border, including a narco terror plot against Chicago launched from Juarez, Mexico. = The Washington Examiner The GOP letter asked for “complete and unredacted copies of all documents and communications responsive” to Freedom of Information Act requests made by the Washington Post, BuzzFeed, and Judicial Watch. It also requested similar FOIA requests by other organizations and outlets related to U.S. government officials, the Wuhan lab, and other coronavirus-related issues, which are listed on NIH’s online FOIA log. = | CLIPS = | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved = |

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: YES or NO? (re: the filibuster)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
The American people delivered Democrats the House, the Senate, and the White House — a clear mandate for change. **But it has become increasingly clear that our victory alone is not enough.**
Pramila has long sounded the alarm on the likelihood of Mitch McConnell weaponizing the outdated Jim Crow filibuster to block progress on urgent, necessary, and popular progressive legislation. And late last month, our worst fears were realized when Senate Republicans blocked the creation of a Commission to investigate the deadly January 6 attack on the Capitol.
Republicans have made their priorities clear: obstruction over progress. **Now we have to make our choice.**[**Can you take this quick survey to let us know if you support abolishing the filibuster? It's important for Pramila to know exactly how you feel as she continues this important work.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/filibuster-survey/?source=em20210616&t=1&akid=380%2E420207%2EXkDp8B)
**[Take the Survey »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/filibuster-survey/?source=em20210616&t=2&akid=380%2E420207%2EXkDp8B)**
It's our democracy OR the filibuster. It's the PRO Act OR the filibuster. It's humane immigration reform OR the filibuster. It's LGBTQIA+ equality OR the filibuster. It's racial justice OR the filibuster. That's why Pramila is helping lead a nationwide push to speak out about ending the filibuster and pressure the Senate to finally get rid of it — and get delivering for the people.
So what do you choose? [**Let Pramila know where you stand on the filibuster by taking this quick survey today.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/filibuster-survey/?source=em20210616&t=3&akid=380%2E420207%2EXkDp8B)
Thank you for making your voice heard,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210616-380-footer&t=4&refcode2=380_420207_XkDp8B&akid=380%2E420207%2EXkDp8B)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

body:
Garland Back Down |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=08d79c9205&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

You know what? Bring in the clowns.

**Well – that’s what’s happening anyway in Arizona.**

_With 100% of the ballots counted in America’s Audit in Maricopa County, the Democrats are getting nervous and the clown show is beginning._

[_Donate TODAY to protect America’s and Arizona’s elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=58603f2011&e=44b8c466b0)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f2f05c31d0&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| My name is Mark Finchem. I am the ORIGINAL “Election Integrity” Conservative, a proud Trump supporter, a former policeman, firefighter, and paramedic – and a patriot leading the charge in fighting election fraud, starting right here in Arizona!

**We have been fighting for a long time, overcoming legal challenges and attacks by the media for simply wanting to do an audit of the election – a right of the state of Arizona!**

_We demanded help in ensuring the sanctity of the American ballot but where was the Department of Justice then?_

**Nowhere to be found.**

But now that we are homing in on one of the biggest frauds in American history?

**Well, Attorney General Merrick Garland said it all:**

**_Merrick Garland said that the DoJ will examine any audits “to ensure they abide by federal statutory requirements to protect election records and avoid intimidation of voters.”_**

Additionally, he has already stated there will be guidance published to make sure that mail in voting and early voting are protected.

**So, let’s be clear here. We have the Department of Justice – before the audit is even completed – stating that they will make it their mission to defend two proven sources of voter fraud, early voting and mail-in ballots?**

_So you won’t get involved to protect the ballot, but you’ll get involved to destroy it?_

**Yep, bring in the clowns.**

_Even though we are making tremendous strides here in Arizona, we are a long way from ensuring the integrity of the American ballot. _

**_This is why I am running for Arizona Secretary of State. I will oversee and protect the ballot in one of the most crucial states for the electoral college._**

[But I cannot do it without your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0d8a3ba128&e=44b8c466b0)

I am writing you today to join one of the strongest, most exciting grassroots movement in history.

**While I am helping lead the charge, I am not the only one fighting back against Merrick Garland and these clowns!**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b6e95a4213&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **Arizona Senator Wendy Rogers responded with fire,_a_**** _s did I._**

Political swamp creatures should never be allowed to break the law to further their own political interests.

**So sorry, Merrick, we’re not going to handle this with kid gloves when the Audit proves successful.**

We are in the middle of a movement of historical proportions fighting back against one of the largest racketeering schemes in the history of America.

**I’m sure if Crooked Merrick wants to look at the Democrats’ handling of the election, he will find plenty of convictions to meet his quota.**

_Will you join our movement?_

[_Donate TODAY to join the movement for Election Integrity and protecting the Sanctity of the Ballot!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=173717be33&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| My name is Mark Finchem, and I am the fighter that Arizona needs.

**Arizona has been spit on and used as a political tool by the Democrats.**

**_Where has Arizona’s voice gone? It can’t be found in the sea of Leftist Corruption, protected by the likes of Crooked Merrick Garland._**

It’s about time for a change.

**We can’t let the Democrats get away with stealing the election. **

**_Not this time. Not ever._**

This is a clown show and it’s time for the curtain call.

[_Donate TODAY to protect our elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=66d24bdb72&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=45070119ff&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c4d37bff31&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE

| |
---

Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737

You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=f5f2f5498b) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=f5f2f5498b).

subject: I hunted the Benghazi terrorists for six years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Congress
body:
American lives were lost due to Hillary Clinton's lies. I had to clean it up. Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=16e18458488d45f5bff4010c0b2f2152&_t=6abmXVIy7swO9hU6rnBso0rP0cE7Pvgb_GC04U41PxnRTxahp7XYtupuxUYK7jUmFgWB7dtbR9GTg6RRIM2b9HGWhlOkWpuGVGi94AK30jrXp_ioLHyo5IkJIDq-BMjWZ7j9i3jgdA7CBkZdAaG7Yv9RHgiEia8dkxywbYZkMXA%3D) | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=16e18458488d45f5bff4010c0b2f2152&_e=N90hpV7-4OmhVdeepRNyzZgv9HLFEjZYoZknWh3WW1I3EVbDrJ97m1njpGFlywKBsRNxUyHBPh8Bgoavpa4sNHx6Ca0wDzLPGNqoKDaIYxag1XLDyCH7SUdHVdv4Gjg2BR3VZULpWC-3kmJmeT__dnX0cxK18u8OCF0UjLz2W0SoGxumpVCn-ba7ylEMH8au8GAz_c9-cuvdH16_bzNHtMr3Ozn6mJ9ZZ19t8SzA6c0f1EVKZLUDoHDiPnG13QKrzI1roAjKgGHZ3MBnkYpJppkb-0lxRl79jGR28VimlLfDEakSXiQxECfMnC9D1RI8esVwjhtP-J7zgTEn6lJ9XxoEl85hnskGHvax_ZvLUNOuGS7j4OBpyre_COvRpUxGdJrGlXogwyYgpiffCD9ogZm4hYWM-JD9BSPFYXvtBMEFFzjKlj9AbECu187f21PJ4ONN78fdaXEZTY5scf-1f5zU9hYzSibaZKEMAzH1Lp2ufQMELiWq0ZbmWcdY8u3Q)
---

Peter,

My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox **I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today.**

I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.**I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own**.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=16e18458488d45f5bff4010c0b2f2152&_e=N90hpV7-4OmhVdeepRNyzZgv9HLFEjZYoZknWh3WW1I3EVbDrJ97m1njpGFlywKBsRNxUyHBPh8Bgoavpa4sNHx6Ca0wDzLPGNqoKDaIYxag1XLDyCH7SUdHVdv4Gjg2BR3VZULpWC-3kmJmeT__dnX0cxK18u8OCF0UjLz2W0SoGxumpVCn-ba7ylEMH8au8GAz_c9-cuvdH16_bzNHtMr3Ozn6mJ9ZZ19t8SzA6c0f1EVKZLUDoHDiPnG13QKrzI1roAjKgGHZ3MBnkYpJppkb-0lxRl79jGR28VimlLcGAz49krR3xlWV4_lj_1XWUt_gxULwK5izTJtGFoXqE8d_TN6hfqnnBBm0G7_yzxugDzwhV-n0hezDI6GDxr1wM_-3EyD1zj6kvAKRkLujkzzEr_FTR4Go8MHfeH9f0lv7pvYOtVSsUi7nU06nM7zcirmsIcfDNRqLJlGnIr9P_9mjpZncIYSBPK18HdswWiyjw3ADKP1_Pe5dihikBylg)

Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency **[I gave up my career in the intelligence service- along with my security clearance - to run for Congress](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=16e18458488d45f5bff4010c0b2f2152&_e=N90hpV7-4OmhVdeepRNyzZgv9HLFEjZYoZknWh3WW1I3EVbDrJ97m1njpGFlywKBsRNxUyHBPh8Bgoavpa4sNHx6Ca0wDzLPGNqoKDaIYxag1XLDyCH7SUdHVdv4Gjg2BR3VZULpWC-3kmJmeT__dnX0cxK18u8OCF0UjLz2W0SoGxumpVCn-ba7ylEMH8au8GAz_c9-cuvdH16_bzNHtMr3Ozn6mJ9ZZ19t8SzA6c0f1EVKZLUDoHDiPnG13QKrzI1roAjKgGHZ3MBnkYpJppkb-0lxRl79jGR28VimlLe5pGkmkSc1QsHIBGRv5ChgD8zxHaf4Qu6tkKMgkgKquS4ine1lBUyI-zY6KivL5XoubdLQ1j_oB--uRISRRmIBsgHjNTsq5vEH-VRnmc866pBNCjPQCQbaH63w4MY9Lg2dcI-j8h1wFCTPrL4ruMDbJSbH8CVtWysAQW7OlupXIewwm-nwJHzu0z-G42n8W0qdg8J1u_ifSM1symakr7Jd)**. I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price.

If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.**As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable** , and in a moment, [**I’m going to humbly ask for your financial assistance regarding my campaign.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=16e18458488d45f5bff4010c0b2f2152&_e=N90hpV7-4OmhVdeepRNyzZgv9HLFEjZYoZknWh3WW1I3EVbDrJ97m1njpGFlywKBsRNxUyHBPh8Bgoavpa4sNHx6Ca0wDzLPGNqoKDaIYxag1XLDyCH7SUdHVdv4Gjg2BR3VZULpWC-3kmJmeT__dnX0cxK18u8OCF0UjLz2W0SoGxumpVCn-ba7ylEMH8au8GAz_c9-cuvdH16_bzNHtMr3Ozn6mJ9ZZ19t8SzA6c0f1EVKZLUDoHDiPnG13QKrzI1roAjKgGHZ3MBnkYpJppkb-0lxRl79jGR28VimlLczYnZ7bgXTmfQfksx6s3ePM7fq-aWi9bAnlN0RXFEA1wb36Pb20ONrG4Fuxn8bnu8bSa0e7IBIjEQxSm0YHKRTK3SQKS4AgNKkD0wxGCKxrjrm01_ugOmZILG9sC9DGaH2djfiINv_t5CsI9sWHRrEH0JYQ6Ob4uB10OcL24cqk3a4Jc8R8W_scroR-PQhIiwtJHh1vwF_hITKK8C0arPd)

You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, _**who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades**_ - along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel.

**This political assassination made my blood boil**. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me - even in the worst of times - that our freedom isn't free at all. _**We have to fight for it**_.

| [**HELP ME FIGHT FOR _YOU_
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=16e18458488d45f5bff4010c0b2f2152&_e=N90hpV7-4OmhVdeepRNyzZgv9HLFEjZYoZknWh3WW1I3EVbDrJ97m1njpGFlywKBsRNxUyHBPh8Bgoavpa4sNHx6Ca0wDzLPGNqoKDaIYxag1XLDyCH7SUdHVdv4Gjg2BR3VZULpWC-3kmJmeT__dnX0cxK18u8OCF0UjLz2W0SoGxumpVCn-ba7ylEMH8au8GAz_c9-cuvdH16_bzNHtMr3Ozn6mJ9ZZ19t8SzA6c0f1EVKZLUDoHDiPnG13QKrzI1roAjKgGHZ3MBnkYpJppkb-0lxRl79jGR28VimlLecjKiQf_br8Yb90wyyiCz1mGhEwmrYShifcyk0-wzYa2sGkJUYZCVai4F6YKRzikStVtpo_ZHT-R_MMX5FXr92kQ4rKcSuzFufhquqU_Tn1D879b18vt2KHqNkza0vKT7OL895R9vfh3E8zE675UOgcqRtePzD31TQfIhYaKEt6cpSk9lj7zMElioF9h0TsW28matX5cA14Tmie6ugBKWt)
---

Depending on who you ask, the Benghazi attack was either a random attack or a pre-meditated campaign of murder. But the fact of the matter is this: An American ambassador was killed in the line of duty and politicians pointed fingers at each other over who was responsible. That BS is the reason **[I’m running for Congress, and today I’m asking if you’ll chip-in $5 or $10 to help me get my campaign off the ground.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=16e18458488d45f5bff4010c0b2f2152&_e=N90hpV7-4OmhVdeepRNyzZgv9HLFEjZYoZknWh3WW1I3EVbDrJ97m1njpGFlywKBsRNxUyHBPh8Bgoavpa4sNHx6Ca0wDzLPGNqoKDaIYxag1XLDyCH7SUdHVdv4Gjg2BR3VZULpWC-3kmJmeT__dnX0cxK18u8OCF0UjLz2W0SoGxumpVCn-ba7ylEMH8au8GAz_c9-cuvdH16_bzNHtMr3Ozn6mJ9ZZ19t8SzA6c0f1EVKZLUDoHDiPnG13QKrzI1roAjKgGHZ3MBnkYpJppkb-0lxRl79jGR28VimlLebe_oyeM1oD_ACFLp7M2JZL_0Hw3SXOQSYdGChffuzn33N4pCN-0E8Mundg414ZVlvWA7rh23DkKePYR88UEQ0TQBbHh-ZSEWCADFf3YbXpxS1ArSasTg9IJ0Yc5H6S5_Q6ggJE1ZgXu7QdI1_ta8WjIkgyAylWFiiky35dZAElQkDERvY3yVbNC6Hg5ZSSMmpgs9Emm3HMUc7PtFWc568) **

At the time of the Benghazi attacks, **Hillary Clinton** knew that she would be running for President in 2016. She **knew that these attacks weren’t random as she suggested, and that as the secretary of State she would be held accountable**. So, like a good career out-of-touch politician, Mrs. Clinton engaged in a campaign of smoke and mirrors, **purposefully leading the American public to believe this was a random attack** , when in fact she told her daughter, Chelsea, the very same evening that the attacks took place that they were pre-meditated by an al-Qaeda ally.

**[Hillary Clinton’s deceptions and lies will forever stand to serve as prime examples of everything that is wrong in Washington.
