clean_body: American lives were lost due to Hillary Clinton's lies. I had to clean it up. Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? | Peter, My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today. I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own. Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency . I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price. If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable , and in a moment, You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades - along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel. This political assassination made my blood boil. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me - even in the worst of times - that our freedom isn't free at all. We have to fight for it. | Depending on who you ask, the Benghazi attack was either a random attack or a pre-meditated campaign of murder. But the fact of the matter is this: An American ambassador was killed in the line of duty and politicians pointed fingers at each other over who was responsible. That BS is the reason At the time of the Benghazi attacks, Hillary Clinton knew that she would be running for President in 2016. She knew that these attacks weren’t random as she suggested, and that as the secretary of State she would be held accountable. So, like a good career out-of-touch politician, Mrs. Clinton engaged in a campaign of smoke and mirrors, purposefully leading the American public to believe this was a random attack , when in fact she told her daughter, Chelsea, the very same evening that the attacks took place that they were pre-meditated by an al-Qaeda ally. . subject: Where is Kamala?
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/df2bae791f9c/i-was-just-at-our-southern-border-4924726?e=13f35c4add)
---
| |
---
| Friend,

[Did you see Vice President Kamala Harris last week on national television trying to lie about going to the border?](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=a7cd5bf16c&e=13f35c4add)
---
| Harris been in charge of fixing the problems at the southern border for 84 days now. **_Yet, we’ve gotten ZERO trips to the border and ZERO plans._**

**Kamala and Biden caused this problem** , but they continue to ignore it.

_They don’t seem to understand why Americans are irate at the record drugs, record illegal entries, suspected terrorists, and child traffickers streaming across our borders. _

In fact, when she’s questioned, Harris just laughs it off.

The photo-ops, boring speeches, and pointless trips around the nation can wait. **It’s past time for the Biden administration to get serious about the border crisis.**

[**_> >>Add your name on this list right now. Any donation of any amount in next 24 hours puts your name at the top our list of patriots who want real leadership. <<<_**](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=0b815d4eb3&e=13f35c4add)

We need to be in this together and put an end to this MADNESS. **Kamala isn’t doing her job; we need to tell her to do it.**

Best,
Chris Jacobs
---
| |
---

subject: We’re dying out here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We can't take anything for granted. Remember Georgia?

********

This isn't time to split hairs, Fellow Conservative. The Radical Left is killing us.

They announced a SEVEN FIGURE investment in top-targeted districts - _that means they 're dumping record amounts of cash in must-win seats to build out their infrastructure, reach out to the_ _handful of on-the-fence voters who will decide the next election, and ultimately buy these seats out from under us._

**Unless we fight back - _fast_ - we could LOSE seats instead of taking back the House and restoring an America First agenda in Congress. Fellow Conservative, we've never been closer to victory. We have to step on the gas.**

**That 's why we've activated an emergency response and launched our very own Grassroots Victory Fund. We have to hit the ground running and with the Left already two steps ahead, we have to run twice as fast.**
****
****GRASSROOTS VICTORY FUND
GOAL: $2,000,000.00
INVITE: MISSING**** ********
---

We can't take anything for granted.

Fellow Conservative, that's why we need to match every dollar the Dems are investing in mobilizing their Radical Left activists to activate our very own grassroots patriots. [**As one of our Top Trump Patriots, I trust that you will give whatever you can so we can defend our country.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f0fd18dc2e524bee8b0660a38d481116&_e=ldFB5aY2M5lN31f68a3FO2ivFga4feBx_rmbo-yYwPjKwyZvBbMpYBmIxt18y9chIxQ8ldO2ad5TIFdsWVI1VnZqmgCILeefpfh5Tjqrlp2c6SADyWkZWLBkU0PIIjueqG8uJG4O3IAKZA5U2oAjuY875msTK88h7sp55uRaWW5PbIttfQYbcllTXx95eFtAmkK20VKi8SUCV9WOZ-_CF-Fj3ukSR-r9hJ9eX05pdlPQYTuqHXWf1Cp2gi44aHpnac6BpycDwbeYeXWEjHFweyzqxrf6L2jxfPHYyjVTEmLKNKByfTXhpPPCna13C6fZiG74-72CdS5FK7-IbDxMGbIpc01Xvg-JlxCWvufrSw3MOgjevVJvasMzQlYNnRtPkHZuS4WPNGPPODnr8rSBOXmvzM86U6ehVsPsEtFwQjWEdEQQL81Ql-32uRDf0E9QUykRTntaHC5AVZcFaiJ4eTkWyCyPSi2Tyqz4XH1zMDMf32WQA916OxwhM15I73iD)

They announced a SEVEN FIGURE investment in top-targeted districts - that means they 're dumping record amounts of cash in must-win seats to build out their infrastructure, reach out to the handful of on-the-fence voters who will decide the next election, and ultimately buy these seats out from under us. Unless we fight back - fast - we could LOSE seats instead of taking back the House and restoring an America First agenda in Congress. Fellow Conservative, we've never been closer to victory. We have to step on the gas. That 's why we've activated an emergency response and launched our very own Grassroots Victory Fund. We have to hit the ground running and with the Left already two steps ahead, we have to run twice as fast. GRASSROOTS VICTORY FUND GOAL: $2,000,000.00 INVITE: MISSING **** We can't take anything for granted. Fellow Conservative, that's why we need to match every dollar the Dems are investing in mobilizing their Radical Left activists to activate our very own grassroots patriots. If you don 't... well, it's not looking good. Please: $23, $17, even just $9 can make an enormous difference for House Conservatives and the state of our country! Thank you, Taylor House Conservatives HQ Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. NRCC 320 First St SE Washington, DC 20003 By providing your cell phone or mobile phone number you are consenting to receive calls and texts, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number with campaign notifications from the National Republican Congressional Committee (58606). NRCC is happy to help at 888-606-1023. Reply HELP for help, STOP** to end. MessFreqMayVary. Msg&DataRatesMayApply. Message frequency may vary. Terms and Conditions . Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .
